snippet.title: YABI - TIMI HO
snippet.description:
Written & performed by YABI THE G.O.A.T
Recorded at Kadak Nepali Records
Mixing & Mastering by Ruthlex
 
Get connected

YABI : https://www.instagram.com/yabi_the_g.o.a.t?igsh=MzE0anFmemF0bXV6&utm_source=qr

kADAK NEPALI RECORDS: https://www.instagram.com/kadaknepali?igsh=cDVoNW82NmIxbWY1

Ruthlex: https://www.instagram.com/ruthlexx_np?igsh=OHJ3djdvM3NmcHpz


вҖңTimi HoвҖқ  the 4th track from my mixtape Boomerang is finally here. This song is about real connection, loyalty, and the one person who becomes your strength when everything else feels uncertain. Sometimes in life, no matter how far things go, the right energy always comes back to you like a boomerang.
Thank you to everyone who keeps supporting the journey and believing in the music. This one is from the heart.

вҖңTimi HoвҖқ is now streaming on all platforms.

snippet.title: Dhurandhar The Revenge Official Hindi Trailer | Ranveer S | Aditya D | In Cinemas 19 March 2026
snippet.description:
Ab Pakistan ka mustakbil, Hindustan tay karega
Dhurandhar The Revenge Trailer Out Now.  Book Now for Paid Previews on 18th March only.

Releasing worldwide on 19 March, on Gudi Padwa, Ugadi, and Eid.

Jio Studios presents
A B62 Studios Production

An Aditya Dhar Film
DHURANDHAR THE REVENGE 

Written, Directed and Produced by Aditya Dhar
Produced by Jyoti Deshpande
Produced by Lokesh Dhar

Trailer Scored, Composed and Produced by Shashwat Sachdev

Ari Ari Song Credits: 
Composed, Arranged and Programmed by Shashwat Sachdev
Vocals: Navtej Singh Rehal (Bombay Rockers), Khan Saab, Jasmine Sandlas & Sudhir Yaduvanshi
Rap Performed and written by Reble, Token 
Lyrics by Irshad Kamil, Bombay Rockers
Score Producer Adam Lucas
Music Supervisor: Adarsh Vishwakarma

Director of Photography - Vikash Nowlakha
Editor: Shivkumar V. Panicker
Music and Background Score: Shashwat Sachdev
Casting Director: Mukesh Chhabra, CSA
Executive Producer: Rahul H. Gandhi
Character & Prosthetics Designer: Preetisheel Singh DвҖҷSouza
Sound Designer: Bishwadeep Chatterjee
Costume Designer: Smriti Chauhan
Action Directors: Aejaz Gulab, Sea Young Oh, Yannick Ben, Ramazan Bulut
Choreographer: Vijay Ganguly
Additional Screenplay: Shivkumar V. Panicker, Ojas Gautam
Additional Production Designer: Rupin Suchak
Associate Director & Second Unit Director: Rohun Rege
Chief Assistant Director: Sameer Sadhwani
DirectorвҖҷs Assistant: Ojas Gautam
Creative Producer: Aarsh Vora
Assistant Producer: Shweta Vora
Line Producer: Naseer Ahmed Khan
Research Consultant: Aditya Raj Kaul, Dibya S.
Associate Editor: Sumit Dhole, Juhi Gopalakrishnan
Marketing Manager: Chelsea Gupta
Production Sound Mixers: Manas Bal, Prabal Pradhan
Post Producer: Gautmik
Re-Recording Mixer: Justin Jose K (CAS)
VFX Supervisor: Dhruti Ranjan Sahoo
VFX Studios: Envision VFX, Philm CGI, Redefine, R2 VFX
DI Studio: Redefine
DI Colourist: Ashirwad Hadkar (ISC)
Digital Agency: White Rivers Media
PR Agency: Communique Film PR
Marketing Agency: MAX Marketing Ltd
Teaser and Trailer Editor: Ojas Gautam
Dubbing & Localization: Annapurna Studios
Visual Promotion: Jayesh Shikarkhane & Team
Publicity Design: Ma & Th (Marching Ants & Trigger Happy)

Jio Studios Team
COO & CFO: Priyanka Chaudhary
CEO Production and Distribution: Deepak Sharma
Chief Legal Officer: Dipti Kotak
PR Head: Amita Naidu

Dhurandhar The Revenge introduces Jaskirat Singh Rangi, tracing the chain of events that compel him to become Hamza Ali Mazari, and follows his rise as he operates deep inside Pakistan. The film is set to return this time in Hindi, Telugu, Tamil, Kannada and Malayalam.

19 March 2026
In Cinemas Worldwide
A Jio Studios Release

IVY ENTERTAINMENT PRESENTS IN ASSOCIATION WITH SHREE AADYA ENTERTAINMENT

      
аҘһаӨҝаӨІаҘҚаӨ® вҖ“  аӨ•аӨҝаӨёаӨҫаӨЁ аӨ¬аӨ№аҘҒаӨ°аӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ (аӨӯаҘӢаӨңаӨӘаҘҒаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ«аӨҝаӨІаҘҚаӨ® )
аӨ•аӨІаӨҫаӨ•аӨҫаӨ° вҖ“ аӨ…аӨӮаӨңаӨЁаӨҫ  аӨёаӨҝаӨӮаӨ№  , аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨ¶аӨҫаӨӮаӨӨ  аӨёаӨҝаӨӮаӨ№  , аҘҷаҘҒаӨ¶аҘҖ аӨқаӨҫ  , аӨөаӨҝаӨҰаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫ  аӨёаӨҝаӨӮаӨ№  , аӨ—аҘӢаӨІаҘӮ  аӨӨаӨҝаӨөаӨҫаӨ°аҘҖ  , аӨ…аӨ¶аҘӢаӨ•  аӨ®аӨҝаӨ¶аҘҚаӨ°аӨҫ  , аӨёаҘҒаӨ§аӨҫ  аӨҜаӨҫаӨҰаӨө  
аӨ¬аӨҫаӨІ аӨ•аӨІаӨҫаӨ•аӨҫаӨ° - аӨҰаҘҖаӨ•аҘҚаӨ·аӨҫ аӨ®аӨҝаӨ¶аҘҚаӨ°аӨҫ
аӨЁаӨҝаӨ°аҘҚаӨҰаҘҮаӨ¶аӨ• вҖ“ аӨ®аӨӮаӨңаҘҒаӨІ аӨ аӨҫаӨ•аҘҒаӨ°
аӨ•аӨҫаӨӮаӨёаҘҮаӨӘаҘҚаӨҹ - аӨёаӨӮаӨҰаҘҖаӨӘ аӨёаӨҝаӨӮаӨ№
аӨІаҘҮаӨ–аӨ•   - аӨ…аӨ°аӨ¬аӨҝаӨӮаӨҰ аӨӨаӨҝаӨөаӨҫаӨ°аҘҖ  
аӨёаӨӮаӨ—аҘҖаӨӨаӨ•аӨҫаӨ°- аӨ“аӨ® аӨқаӨҫ
аӨ—аҘҖаӨӨаӨ•аӨҫаӨ° - аӨ…аӨ°аӨ¬аӨҝаӨӮаӨҰ аӨӨаӨҝаӨөаӨҫаӨ°аҘҖ , аӨӘаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨ°аҘҮ аӨІаӨҫаӨІ аӨҜаӨҫаӨҰаӨө 
аӨӣаӨҫаӨҜаӨҫаӨӮаӨ•аӨЁ -  аӨҮаӨ®аӨ°аӨҫаӨЁ аӨ¶аӨ—аҘҒаӨЁ
аӨёаӨӮаӨ•аӨІаӨЁ - аӨёаӨ®аҘҖаӨ° аӨ¶аҘҲаҘҷ аӨө аӨңаӨҫаӨ№аӨҝаӨҰ аӨ–аӨҫаӨЁ
аӨ•аҘӢаӨ°аӨҝаӨҜаҘӢаӨ—аҘҚаӨ°аӨҫаӨ«аӨ° вҖ“ аӨҸаӨ® .аӨ•аҘҮ .аӨ—аҘҒаӨӘаҘҚаӨӨаӨҫ (аӨңаҘүаӨҜ )
аӨӘаҘӢаӨёаҘҚаӨҹ аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аҘӢаӨЎаӨ•аҘҚаӨ¶аӨЁ - аӨҰаӨҫаӨё аӨёаҘҚаӨҹаҘӮаӨЎаӨҝаӨҜаҘӢ
аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аҘӢаӨЎаӨ•аҘҚаӨ¶аӨЁ  аӨ•аӨӮаӨҹаҘҚаӨ°аҘӢаӨІаӨ°  вҖ“ аӨ°аҘӢаӨ¶аӨЁ  аӨ°аҘүаӨҜ  , аӨёаҘӢаӨЁаҘӮ  аӨ®аӨҝаӨ¶аҘҚаӨ°аӨҫ 
аӨІаҘӢаӨ•аӨІ  аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аҘӢаӨЎаӨ•аҘҚаӨ¶аӨЁ  вҖ“  аӨ®аҘҒаӨ•аҘҮаӨ¶  аӨҰаҘҒаӨ¬аҘҮ  ,аӨ•аӨ®аӨІаҘҮаӨ¶  аӨёаӨҝаӨӮаӨ№, аӨҰаҘҒаӨ·аҘҚаӨҜаӨӮаӨӨ   аӨёаӨҝаӨӮаӨ№   
аӨҶаӨ°аҘҚаӨҹ аӨЎаӨҫаӨҜаӨ°аҘҮаӨ•аҘҚаӨҹаӨ° вҖ“ аӨЁаҘӣаҘҖаӨ° аӨ¶аҘҮаӨ–

аӨӘаҘӢаӨёаҘҚаӨҹ аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аҘӢаӨЎаӨ•аҘҚаӨ¶аӨЁ - аӨҰаӨҫаӨё аӨёаҘҚаӨҹаҘӮаӨЎаӨҝаӨҜаҘӢ
аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аҘӢаӨЎаӨ•аҘҚаӨ¶аӨЁ  аӨ•аӨӮаӨҹаҘҚаӨ°аҘӢаӨІаӨ°  вҖ“ аӨ°аҘӢаӨ¶аӨЁ  аӨ°аҘүаӨҜ  , аӨёаҘӢаӨЁаҘӮ  аӨ®аӨҝаӨ¶аҘҚаӨ°аӨҫ 
аӨІаҘӢаӨ•аӨІ  аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аҘӢаӨЎаӨ•аҘҚаӨ¶аӨЁ  вҖ“  аӨ®аҘҒаӨ•аҘҮаӨ¶  аӨҰаҘҒаӨ¬аҘҮ  ,аӨ•аӨ®аӨІаҘҮаӨ¶  аӨёаӨҝаӨӮаӨ№, аӨҰаҘҒаӨ·аҘҚаӨҜаӨӮаӨӨ   аӨёаӨҝаӨӮаӨ№   
аӨҶаӨ°аҘҚаӨҹ аӨЎаӨҫаӨҜаӨ°аҘҮаӨ•аҘҚаӨҹаӨ° вҖ“ аӨЁаҘӣаҘҖаӨ° аӨ¶аҘҮаӨ–
аӨЁаӨҝаӨ°аҘҚаӨ®аӨҫаӨӨаӨҫ - аӨёаӨӮаӨҰаҘҖаӨӘ аӨёаӨҝаӨӮаӨ№, аӨ®аӨӮаӨңаҘҒаӨІ аӨ аӨҫаӨ•аҘҒаӨ°
 аӨ®аҘҚаӨҜаҘӮаӨңаӨҝаӨ• вҖ“ IVY MUSIC 
аӨёаҘ…аӨҹаҘ…аӨІаӨҫаӨҮаӨҹ аӨ”аӨ° аӨЎаӨҝаӨңаӨҝаӨҹаӨІ аӨӘаӨҫаӨ°аҘҚаӨҹаӨЁаӨ° - B4U аӨӯаҘӢаӨңаӨӘаҘҒаӨ°аҘҖ
B4U аӨ•аҘҚаӨ°аӨҝаӨҸаӨҹаӨҝаӨө аӨҹаҘҖаӨ® вҖ“ 
аӨ®аӨҫаӨ°аҘҒаӨҰ аӨ¶аӨ°аҘҚаӨ®аӨҫ, аӨЁаҘҮаӨ№аӨҫ аӨүаӨӘаӨҫаӨ§аҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨҜ, аӨөаӨҝаӨ¶аӨҫаӨІ аӨҜаӨҫаӨҰаӨө

B4U аӨІаҘҖаӨ—аӨІ - аӨёаӨӮаӨҰаҘҖаӨӘ аӨ°аӨҫаӨЈаӨҫ , аӨӨаҘғаӨ·аҘҚаӨЈаӨҫ аӨӘаӨҹаҘҮаӨІ , аӨӘаҘӮаӨЁаӨ® аӨ¶аӨҝаӨӮаӨҰаҘҮ , аӨҶаӨ•аӨҫаӨӮаӨ•аҘҚаӨ·аӨҫ аӨөаӨҫаӨ•аҘӢаӨЎаҘҮ вҖ“ аӨ®аҘӢаӨ°аҘҮ
аӨ‘аӨ«аӨҝаӨё аӨ¬аҘүаӨҜ вҖ“ аӨ•аӨЁаҘҚаӨ№аҘҲаӨҜаӨҫ аӨқаӨҫ 

IVY вҖ“ аӨҸаӨӮаӨҹаӨ°аӨҹаҘҮаӨЁаӨ®аҘҮаӨӮаӨҹ - аӨ«аӨҫаӨҮаӨЁаҘҮаӨӮаӨё  -
 аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨҰаҘҖаӨӘ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨҰаӨҫаӨ—аӨҫ , аӨңаӨҝаӨЁаҘҮаӨІаҘҮ аӨ®аҘҲаӨёаҘҚаӨ•аӨ°аҘҮаӨЁаҘҚаӨ№аӨҫаӨё , аӨөаӨҝаӨӘаҘҒаӨІ аӨңаҘҲаӨЁ , аӨЁаӨҝаӨөаҘғаӨӨаҘҚаӨӨаӨҝ аӨӘаӨҫаӨҹаӨҝаӨІ , аӨ—аӨЈаҘҮаӨ¶ аӨ®аӨ№аӨҫаӨҰаҘҮаӨө аӨҹаӨҫаӨӘаӨ°аҘҮ , аӨ№аӨҝаӨ®аӨҫаӨӮаӨ¶аҘҒ аӨҡаҘҢаӨ§аӨ°аҘҖ

 аӨёаӨӮаӨӨаҘӢаӨ· аӨ—аӨ°аҘҚаӨ— , аӨ°аӨөаӨҝаӨӮаӨҰаӨ° аӨёаӨҫаӨІаҘҚаӨөаҘҖ , аӨёаӨҫаӨ•аҘҚаӨ·аҘҖ аӨ¶аҘҲаӨІаӨҫаӨ°

snippet.title: Bairan вҖ“ Animated Love Story | Banjaare (Official Video)
snippet.description:
Bairan was never meant to be a hit.

We made Bairan for hearts, not for trends, not for reels, not for charts

No label. No big budget. Just two Brothers and a feeling.

We shot a real music video in Chandigarh.
We trusted the wrong person.
And received cheap quality.
That video almost destroyed this song.
So we cancelled everything.
We uploaded only the audio through DistroKid, with no marketing, no plans.
Then something magical happened.
YouTube algorithm picked Bairan.
People started listening.
People started feeling it.
People made it viral.
And suddenly, Bairan was no longer OUR song.
It became YOUR song.
ThatвҖҷs why we decided to create this animated music video.
Because when characters are animated, everyone can see themselves in the story.
Every broken heart becomes the hero.
Every lover becomes the character.

This video is dedicated to every person who felt Bairan.
This is your story.
This is your song.


Song Credits: 
Title: Bairan
Singer/Lyricist/Composer: BANJAARE
Music: Roni
Mix-Master: Gurie
Animation : Ham_mah.10

Special Thanks To - Jayant Kamboj , Rajkumari 

Spotify:-

https://open.spotify.com/track/4iLMuGacSurMAKeQyIwFeJ?si=XhB3Yr_DSdiQjMaq7OSobw

Apple Music:-

localized.title: Bairan вҖ“ Animated Love Story | Banjaare (Official Video)
localized.description:
Bairan was never meant to be a hit.

We made Bairan for hearts, not for trends, not for reels, not for charts

No label. No big budget. Just two Brothers and a feeling.

We shot a real music video in Chandigarh.
We trusted the wrong person.
And received cheap quality.
That video almost destroyed this song.
So we cancelled everything.
We uploaded only the audio through DistroKid, with no marketing, no plans.
Then something magical happened.
YouTube algorithm picked Bairan.
People started listening.
People started feeling it.
People made it viral.
And suddenly, Bairan was no longer OUR song.
It became YOUR song.
ThatвҖҷs why we decided to create this animated music video.
Because when characters are animated, everyone can see themselves in the story.
Every broken heart becomes the hero.
Every lover becomes the character.

This video is dedicated to every person who felt Bairan.
This is your story.
This is your song.


Song Credits: 
Title: Bairan
Singer/Lyricist/Composer: BANJAARE
Music: Roni
Mix-Master: Gurie
Animation : Ham_mah.10

Special Thanks To - Jayant Kamboj , Rajkumari

hi.title: Bairan вҖ“ Animated Love Story | Banjaare (Official Video)
hi.description:
Bairan was never meant to be a hit.

We made Bairan for hearts, not for trends, not for reels, not for charts

No label. No big budget. Just two Brothers and a feeling.

We shot a real music video in Chandigarh.
We trusted the wrong person.
And received cheap quality.
That video almost destroyed this song.
So we cancelled everything.
We uploaded only the audio through DistroKid, with no marketing, no plans.
Then something magical happened.
YouTube algorithm picked Bairan.
People started listening.
People started feeling it.
People made it viral.
And suddenly, Bairan was no longer OUR song.
It became YOUR song.
ThatвҖҷs why we decided to create this animated music video.
Because when characters are animated, everyone can see themselves in the story.
Every broken heart becomes the hero.
Every lover becomes the character.

This video is dedicated to every person who felt Bairan.
This is your story.
This is your song.


Song Credits: 
Title: Bairan
Singer/Lyricist/Composer: BANJAARE
Music: Roni
Mix-Master: Gurie
Animation : Ham_mah.10

Special Thanks To - Jayant Kamboj , Rajkumari

https://open.spotify.com/track/4iLMuGacSurMAKeQyIwFeJ?si=XhB3Yr_DSdiQjMaq7OSobw

аӨ®аӨЁаҘҲ аӨёаӨҫаӨӮаӨӯ-аӨёаӨҫаӨӮаӨӯ аӨ°аӨҫаӨ–аҘҮ

snippet.title: BTS (л°©нғ„мҶҢл…„лӢЁ) 'м•„лҰ¬лһ‘ (ARIRANG)' Animation Trailer: What is your love song?
snippet.description:
ліё мҪҳн…җмё лҠ” 1896л…„ 5мӣ” 8мқјмһҗ The Washington Postм—җ мӢӨлҰ° н•ңкөӯ мІӯл…„ 7мқёмқҳ мқҙм•јкё°(вҖңSeven Koreans at Howard")мҷҖ, мқҙл“Ө мӨ‘ мқјл¶Җк°Җ к°ҷмқҖ н•ҙ 7мӣ” 24мқј лҜёкөӯ мӣҢмӢұн„ҙ D.C.м—җм„ң н•ңкөӯ мөңмҙҲмқҳ мқҢмӣҗмқ„ л…№мқҢн•ң кё°лЎқм—җм„ң мҳҒк°җмқ„ л°ӣм•„ кё°нҡҚлҗҳм—ҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ. н•ңкөӯм—җм„ң кұҙл„Ҳк°„ мІӯл…„л“Өмқҳ мӢӨм ң лӘ©мҶҢлҰ¬к°Җ лӢҙкёҙ м—ӯмӮ¬м Ғ кё°лЎқкіј мөңмҙҲмқҳ м•„лҰ¬лһ‘ л…№мқҢмқҙлқјлҠ” л¬ёнҷ”м Ғ мқҳлҜёлҘј лӘЁнӢ°лёҢлЎң мӮјм•„ нҳ„лҢҖм Ғ мғҒмғҒл Ҙм—җ кё°л°ҳн•ҳм—¬ мһ¬кө¬м„ұ л°Ҹ м°Ҫмһ‘лҗң кІғмңјлЎң, мӢӨм ңмҷҖ лӢӨлҘј мҲҳ мһҲмңјл©° м—ӯмӮ¬м Ғ мӮ¬кұҙмқҙлӮҳ мқёл¬јм—җ лҢҖн•ң нҸүк°ҖВ·н•ҙм„қкіјлҠ” л¬ҙкҙҖн•Ёмқ„ л°қнһҷлӢҲлӢӨ.

This video was inspired by the story of seven young Koreans as documented in The Washington Post on May 8, 1896 (вҖңSeven Koreans at HowardвҖқ), some of whom captured the first known audio recordings of Koreans in Washington, D.C., on July 24 of that same year. As a modern reimagining, this work draws upon the profound cultural significance of these historical records, which preserve the authentic voices of young Korean men and the first-ever recording of вҖңArirang.вҖқ This production may deviate from actual historical events and does not serve as a formal evaluation or interpretation of any historical event or person.


Credits:

Assitant Director: Jiin Yoo

Modeler: Helen Kim, Seong Daseul, Jiwon Shin, Gahyun Lee, Youjin Lim, Daeun Jeong, Jieon Kim,
Rigging Artist: Dohyun Yeo
Animator: Yeji Suhl, Hyejin Ahn, Park So Yeon, Joonhyuk Suh, Haerin Kim
Lighting Artist: Helen Kim, Seong Daseul, Jiwon Shin, Gahyun Lee

2D Animation Supervisor: Cho Hea Seung, SeokWoo Kim

localized.title: BTS (л°©нғ„мҶҢл…„лӢЁ) 'м•„лҰ¬лһ‘ (ARIRANG)' Animation Trailer: What is your love song?
localized.description:
ліё мҪҳн…җмё лҠ” 1896л…„ 5мӣ” 8мқјмһҗ The Washington Postм—җ мӢӨлҰ° н•ңкөӯ мІӯл…„ 7мқёмқҳ мқҙм•јкё°(вҖңSeven Koreans at Howard")мҷҖ, мқҙл“Ө мӨ‘ мқјл¶Җк°Җ к°ҷмқҖ н•ҙ 7мӣ” 24мқј лҜёкөӯ мӣҢмӢұн„ҙ D.C.м—җм„ң н•ңкөӯ мөңмҙҲмқҳ мқҢмӣҗмқ„ л…№мқҢн•ң кё°лЎқм—җм„ң мҳҒк°җмқ„ л°ӣм•„ кё°нҡҚлҗҳм—ҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ. н•ңкөӯм—җм„ң кұҙл„Ҳк°„ мІӯл…„л“Өмқҳ мӢӨм ң лӘ©мҶҢлҰ¬к°Җ лӢҙкёҙ м—ӯмӮ¬м Ғ кё°лЎқкіј мөңмҙҲмқҳ м•„лҰ¬лһ‘ л…№мқҢмқҙлқјлҠ” л¬ёнҷ”м Ғ мқҳлҜёлҘј лӘЁнӢ°лёҢлЎң мӮјм•„ нҳ„лҢҖм Ғ мғҒмғҒл Ҙм—җ кё°л°ҳн•ҳм—¬ мһ¬кө¬м„ұ л°Ҹ м°Ҫмһ‘лҗң кІғмңјлЎң, мӢӨм ңмҷҖ лӢӨлҘј мҲҳ мһҲмңјл©° м—ӯмӮ¬м Ғ мӮ¬кұҙмқҙлӮҳ мқёл¬јм—җ лҢҖн•ң нҸүк°ҖВ·н•ҙм„қкіјлҠ” л¬ҙкҙҖн•Ёмқ„ л°қнһҷлӢҲлӢӨ.

This video was inspired by the story of seven young Koreans as documented in The Washington Post on May 8, 1896 (вҖңSeven Koreans at HowardвҖқ), some of whom captured the first known audio recordings of Koreans in Washington, D.C., on July 24 of that same year. As a modern reimagining, this work draws upon the profound cultural significance of these historical records, which preserve the authentic voices of young Korean men and the first-ever recording of вҖңArirang.вҖқ This production may deviate from actual historical events and does not serve as a formal evaluation or interpretation of any historical event or person.


Credits:
Director: Hur Sungwhe
Art Director: LГ©a Pinto
CG Supervisor: Seunghyuk Hwang

Assitant Director: Jiin Yoo
Line Producer: Kim Yulee, Sungwan Lim, Kim Min Ju, Jiwon Lee
Storyboard Artist: Lee Seung gyu

Character Designer: Younhyung Ku, Seonga Kwon, Lena Sayaphoum, Helen Kim, Seong Daseul, Jiwon Shin, Gahyun Lee
Background Designer: LГ©a Pinto, Judit Boor

Modeler: Helen Kim, Seong Daseul, Jiwon Shin, Gahyun Lee, Youjin Lim, Daeun Jeong, Jieon Kim,
Rigging Artist: Dohyun Yeo
Animator: Yeji Suhl, Hyejin Ahn, Park So Yeon, Joonhyuk Suh, Haerin Kim
Lighting Artist: Helen Kim, Seong Daseul, Jiwon Shin, Gahyun Lee

2D Animation Supervisor: Cho Hea Seung, SeokWoo Kim
2D Animator: Kim Jiyul, Woo Ji Yeon, Choi Ji Hyun, Choi Yu Mi, Park Yun Seo, Yang Eun Ji, Jeong Yunbi, Lee Min Ji, Jun Hye Jin, Dabin Jung, So-dam Jeong, Ryoun-Ki Hong, Jin-young Go
2D Animation Timer: Park Dae Yeol, Jo Ahra
2D Effects Artist: Ina Choi

'Arirang' Composer & Piano: Goldbranch
Sound Designer: Jang Mi Ra

#BTS #л°©нғ„мҶҢл…„лӢЁ #BTS_ARIRANG

snippet.title: Bhooth Bangla Teaser REVIEW | Deeksha Sharma
snippet.description:
Bhooth Bangla Teaser Review By Deeksha Sharma. Akshay Kumar with Director Priyadarshan is set for Bhooth Bangla Franchise with Tabu & Wamiqa Gabbi in Mysterious Roles of Horror Comedy & Suspense- Bhooth Bangla Teaser is pure Nostalgia of Bhool Bhulaiyaa but falls short in editing & establishing connection of Old Characters in new story. Bhooth Bangla Teaser Trailer Reaction & Full Movie Expectation would be shared in this Video. Can Akshay Kumar challenge Kartik Aaryan for OG Horror Comedy Franchise? Do leave Comments below now!

snippet.title: Ganga Ke Kinare | Bunny | Sagar | Kripa Record
snippet.description:
Kripa Record Presents "Ganga Ke Kinare"

Singer - Bunny & Sagar
Music & Compose - Bunny 
Lyrics - Sagar 
Flute - Kiran Vinkar
Mix & Master - Hanish Taneja

Featuring - Dimpy Negi
Director - Alex
Creative Director & DOP - Arshad
Editor - Zipsi
Colourist - Onkar
VFX - Ronak Bindra and Aman Singh bhakuni 
BTS - Shubham rana 
Camera Assitant - Golu
Sagar & Bunny Makeup & Hair - Viren 
Dimpy makeup & Hair - Sonakshi & Isha 
Choreographer - Chinu
Foreigners Coordinator - Chinu & Vijay Rawat
Dimpy Costume - Nandini Fashion ( Lehnga )
Camera & Light- Y-Series Production Lights 
Gaffer - Sunil 
Drone - Shanky 

Special thanks - Parmarth Niketan Ashram

Team Kripa Record - Ankita

Digital Distribution - Universal Music
Project Head - Sahil Sharma 

Lyrics: 

Chaand ko niharu
Shiv Jo pukaru x2
Ganga ke kinaare baith ke 
Baith keвҖҰ
Ganga ke kinaare 
baith ke 

Rooh ko sawaru 
Aarti utaaru
Ganga ke kinaare baith ke x2
Baith keвҖҰ. 

Hum toh hmare hi jeevan se hai itne 
Sataaye hue 
Toote hain bikhre hain hum toh 
Sabke bhulaye hue 

Kehte hain aaye jo 
Ganga nahaye 
Har jaate hain sab log 
Ab humne samjha hai 
Ab humne jana 
Kyu ganga aate hain log 

Thakk gaye the hum 
Dukhon ko utha ke 
Ab chain ayaaa 
Aayi ab saansain
Ganga ke kinaare baith ke 
Baith ke вҖҰ. X2 

Kyu roye har baat me bandeya 
Kya laya tha sath me bandeya 
Jaane de jo chala gaya hai 
Kuch bi nai tere hath me bandeya  

Man nahi bharta 
Jitna bi taakain
Itna sukoon hain 
Bhar gayi aankhain
Ganga ke kinaare bath keвҖҰ
 
Ganga dharaye shivaye Ganga dharaye 
Har har bole namah shivaye..

Reach us at: Kriparecordsindia@gmail.com

(c) Universal Music Group

в–ә About Kripa Record:

"Kripa Record" is a devotional music label dedicated to producing and promoting spiritual music that inspires profound experiences. "Kripa" meaning "grace" in Sanskrit, reflects the essence of divine mercy in the label's music. KripaвҖҷs diverse devotional music is crafted by renowned artists, invoking peace, reverence, and spiritual awakening. It will serve as a cherished companion for meditation, prayer, and reflection.

snippet.title: VEK X @swar5729 - SWAR | Prod by pozod
snippet.description:
Final stop. Final energy. Final chapter of a journey weвҖҷll never forget.
ClassX Rush Live Final EP

Vek вң–пёҸ Swar вҖ” two voices, one stage, one powerful moment.
This is not just a live session, this is the closing of a story built with passion, pressure, practice, and pure love for music.

From the first beat to the last note, this final episode carries everything we believe in  raw performance, real emotion, and real connection with the crowd.
No filters. No shortcuts. Just music, movement, and memories made on stage.

Thank you to everyone who supported the journey, watched every episode, shared the clips, and believed in what we are building.
This one is for the culture.
This one is for the grind.
This one is for the people who never stopped listening.

PROD mix master : Pozod
KEYS : santosh tamang
Written & Composed : Swapnil Sharma
Shot by : ZAY & Acies ( Aurora production )

ClassX RUSH Live вҖ“ Final EP
Vek вң–пёҸ Swar  one stage, one moment, one memory.

В© 2026 ClassX Presentation

snippet.title: DHURANDHAR THE REVENGE Trailer Reaction! | Ranveer Singh | Arjun Rampal | Sanjay Dutt | Aditya Dhar
snippet.description:
Jaby and Achara react to the explosive trailer of the upcoming spy-action sequel Dhurandhar: The Revenge, a high-stakes continuation of the blockbuster franchise directed by Aditya Dhar. The trailer teases an intense revenge-driven story filled with brutal action, political intrigue, and powerful confrontations as the conflict escalates across borders. вҡ”пёҸрҹ”Ҙ

The film features a powerhouse cast led by Ranveer Singh (Padmaavat, Gully Boy, Bajirao Mastani), alongside Sanjay Dutt (KGF: Chapter 2, Munna Bhai M.B.B.S.), R. Madhavan (Rocketry: The Nambi Effect, 3 Idiots), Arjun Rampal (Ra.One, Om Shanti Om), Akshaye Khanna (Drishyam 2, Border), and Sara Arjun (Deiva Thirumagal, Saivam), all bringing intensity and depth to this gritty espionage thriller. The trailer promises larger-than-life action, emotional stakes, and a story fueled by revenge and patriotism.

#DhurandharTheRevenge #RanveerSingh #TrailerReaction #BollywoodReaction #SpyThriller #IndianCinema

snippet.title: аӨ°аӨҫаӨңаӨҫаӨ•аҘӢ аӨ®аҘҒаӨҰаҘҚаӨҰаӨҫВ аӨ…аӨ¬ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ№аҘҒаӨЁаҘҚаӨӣ ? аӨңаҘҮаӨЁаҘҚаӨңаҘҖаӨҰаҘҮаӨ–аӨҝ аӨҰаҘҮаӨ¶аӨ•аҘҲ аӨ¬аҘҒаӨҰаҘҚаӨ§аӨҝаӨңаҘҖаӨөаҘҖаӨ№аӨ°аҘҒ аӨҸаӨ•аҘҲ аӨ аӨҫаӨүаӨҒ !! аӨёаӨ®аӨёаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨ•аҘӢ аӨҡаҘҒаӨ°аҘӢ аӨ•аҘҒаӨ°аҘӢ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ№аҘӢ ?
snippet.description:
Churo Kuro Tv

аӨёаҘӮаӨҡаӨЁаӨҫ аӨөаӨҝаӨӯаӨҫаӨ— аӨҰаӨ°аҘҚаӨӨаӨҫ аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨ®аӨҫаӨЈаӨӘаӨӨаҘҚаӨ° аӨЁаӨӮ.      : аҘӘаҘ¬аҘ¬аҘ§-аҘЁаҘҰаҘ®аҘ§/аҘЁаҘҰаҘ®аҘЁ
аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аҘҮаӨё аӨ•аӨҫаӨүаӨЁаҘҚаӨёаӨҝаӨІ аӨёаҘӮаӨҡаҘҖаӨ•аӨ°аӨЈ аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨ®аӨҫаӨЈаӨӘаӨӨаҘҚаӨ° аӨЁаӨӮ. : аҘӘаҘ¬аҘ¬аҘҰ-аҘЁаҘҰаҘ®аҘ§/аҘҰаҘ®аҘЁ


аӨ®аҘҒаӨ–аҘҚаӨҜаӨӨаӨҜаӨҫ аӨҜаӨё аӨҹаӨҝаӨӯаҘҖаӨ®аӨҫ аӨ°аӨҫаӨңаӨЁаҘҲаӨӨаӨҝаӨ•, аӨҶаӨ°аҘҚаӨҘаӨҝаӨ•, аӨёаӨҫаӨӮаӨёаҘҚаӨ•аҘғаӨӨаӨҝаӨ• аӨӨаӨҘаӨҫ аӨёаӨ®аӨёаӨҫаӨ®аӨҜаӨҝаӨ• аӨөаӨҝаӨ·аӨҜаӨ®аӨҫ аӨёаӨ®аҘҚаӨ¬аӨЁаҘҚаӨ§аӨҝаӨӨ аӨөаҘҚаӨҜаӨ•аҘҚаӨӨаӨҝаӨёаӨҒаӨ—  аӨ—аӨ°аҘҖаӨҸаӨ•аҘӢ аӨ•аҘҒаӨ°аӨҫаӨ•аӨҫаӨЁаҘҖ, аӨӨаӨҘаӨҫ аӨёаӨ®аӨҫаӨҡаӨҫаӨ°аӨ®аҘӮаӨІаӨ• аӨёаӨҫаӨ®аӨҫаӨ—аҘҚаӨ°аҘҖ  аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨ¶аӨҫаӨ°аӨЈ аӨ—аӨ°аӨҝаӨЁаҘҚаӨӣ аҘӨ аӨ№аӨҫаӨ®аҘҖаӨІаҘҮ аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨ¶аӨҫаӨ°аӨЈ аӨ—аӨ°аҘҮаӨ•аӨҫ аӨёаӨҫаӨ®аӨҫаӨ—аҘҚаӨ°аҘҖаӨІаҘҮ аӨёаӨ®аӨҫаӨң аӨ°аҘҒаӨӘаӨҫаӨЁаҘҚаӨӨаӨ°аӨЈаӨ®аӨҫ аӨ…аӨ№аӨ®аҘҚ аӨӯаҘӮаӨ®аӨҝаӨ•аӨҫ аӨ–аҘҮаӨІаҘҚаӨЁаҘҮаӨӣ аӨӯаӨЁаҘҚаӨЁаҘҮ аӨ№аӨҫаӨ®аҘҚаӨ°аҘӢ аӨ…аӨӘаҘҮаӨ•аҘҚаӨ·аӨҫ аӨ°аӨ№аҘҮаӨ•аҘӢ аӨӣ аҘӨ аӨҜаӨёаӨ•аӨҫ аӨІаӨҫаӨ—аӨҝ аӨӨаӨӘаӨҫаӨҲаӨ№аӨ°аҘҒаӨ•аҘӢ аӨ¬аӨІаӨҝаӨҜаҘӢ аӨёаӨҫаӨҘ аӨЁаҘҲ аӨ№аӨҫаӨ®аҘҚаӨ°аҘӢ аӨёаӨ«аӨІаӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘӢ аҘӨ аӨ№аӨҫаӨ®аҘҖ аӨӨаӨӘаӨҫаӨҲаӨӮаӨ№аӨ°аҘҒаӨ•аҘӢ аӨЁаӨҝаӨ°аӨЁаҘҚаӨӨаӨ° аӨёаӨІаҘҚаӨІаӨҫаӨ№ аӨёаҘҒаӨқаӨҫаӨөаӨ•аҘӢ аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨӨаӨҝаӨ•аҘҚаӨ·аӨҫаӨ®аӨҫ аӨӣаҘҢ аҘӨ  

Program : Churo Bahas With Umesh Subedi 
Presenter : Umesh Subedi
Guest:  
Camera : Kabindra Oli 
Editor : Kabindra Oli

localized.title: аӨ°аӨҫаӨңаӨҫаӨ•аҘӢ аӨ®аҘҒаӨҰаҘҚаӨҰаӨҫВ аӨ…аӨ¬ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ№аҘҒаӨЁаҘҚаӨӣ ? аӨңаҘҮаӨЁаҘҚаӨңаҘҖаӨҰаҘҮаӨ–аӨҝ аӨҰаҘҮаӨ¶аӨ•аҘҲ аӨ¬аҘҒаӨҰаҘҚаӨ§аӨҝаӨңаҘҖаӨөаҘҖаӨ№аӨ°аҘҒ аӨҸаӨ•аҘҲ аӨ аӨҫаӨүаӨҒ !! аӨёаӨ®аӨёаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨ•аҘӢ аӨҡаҘҒаӨ°аҘӢ аӨ•аҘҒаӨ°аҘӢ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ№аҘӢ ?
localized.description:
Churo Kuro Tv

аӨёаҘӮаӨҡаӨЁаӨҫ аӨөаӨҝаӨӯаӨҫаӨ— аӨҰаӨ°аҘҚаӨӨаӨҫ аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨ®аӨҫаӨЈаӨӘаӨӨаҘҚаӨ° аӨЁаӨӮ.      : аҘӘаҘ¬аҘ¬аҘ§-аҘЁаҘҰаҘ®аҘ§/аҘЁаҘҰаҘ®аҘЁ
аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аҘҮаӨё аӨ•аӨҫаӨүаӨЁаҘҚаӨёаӨҝаӨІ аӨёаҘӮаӨҡаҘҖаӨ•аӨ°аӨЈ аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨ®аӨҫаӨЈаӨӘаӨӨаҘҚаӨ° аӨЁаӨӮ. : аҘӘаҘ¬аҘ¬аҘҰ-аҘЁаҘҰаҘ®аҘ§/аҘҰаҘ®аҘЁ


аӨ®аҘҒаӨ–аҘҚаӨҜаӨӨаӨҜаӨҫ аӨҜаӨё аӨҹаӨҝаӨӯаҘҖаӨ®аӨҫ аӨ°аӨҫаӨңаӨЁаҘҲаӨӨаӨҝаӨ•, аӨҶаӨ°аҘҚаӨҘаӨҝаӨ•, аӨёаӨҫаӨӮаӨёаҘҚаӨ•аҘғаӨӨаӨҝаӨ• аӨӨаӨҘаӨҫ аӨёаӨ®аӨёаӨҫаӨ®аӨҜаӨҝаӨ• аӨөаӨҝаӨ·аӨҜаӨ®аӨҫ аӨёаӨ®аҘҚаӨ¬аӨЁаҘҚаӨ§аӨҝаӨӨ аӨөаҘҚаӨҜаӨ•аҘҚаӨӨаӨҝаӨёаӨҒаӨ—  аӨ—аӨ°аҘҖаӨҸаӨ•аҘӢ аӨ•аҘҒаӨ°аӨҫаӨ•аӨҫаӨЁаҘҖ, аӨӨаӨҘаӨҫ аӨёаӨ®аӨҫаӨҡаӨҫаӨ°аӨ®аҘӮаӨІаӨ• аӨёаӨҫаӨ®аӨҫаӨ—аҘҚаӨ°аҘҖ  аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨ¶аӨҫаӨ°аӨЈ аӨ—аӨ°аӨҝаӨЁаҘҚаӨӣ аҘӨ аӨ№аӨҫаӨ®аҘҖаӨІаҘҮ аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨ¶аӨҫаӨ°аӨЈ аӨ—аӨ°аҘҮаӨ•аӨҫ аӨёаӨҫаӨ®аӨҫаӨ—аҘҚаӨ°аҘҖаӨІаҘҮ аӨёаӨ®аӨҫаӨң аӨ°аҘҒаӨӘаӨҫаӨЁаҘҚаӨӨаӨ°аӨЈаӨ®аӨҫ аӨ…аӨ№аӨ®аҘҚ аӨӯаҘӮаӨ®аӨҝаӨ•аӨҫ аӨ–аҘҮаӨІаҘҚаӨЁаҘҮаӨӣ аӨӯаӨЁаҘҚаӨЁаҘҮ аӨ№аӨҫаӨ®аҘҚаӨ°аҘӢ аӨ…аӨӘаҘҮаӨ•аҘҚаӨ·аӨҫ аӨ°аӨ№аҘҮаӨ•аҘӢ аӨӣ аҘӨ аӨҜаӨёаӨ•аӨҫ аӨІаӨҫаӨ—аӨҝ аӨӨаӨӘаӨҫаӨҲаӨ№аӨ°аҘҒаӨ•аҘӢ аӨ¬аӨІаӨҝаӨҜаҘӢ аӨёаӨҫаӨҘ аӨЁаҘҲ аӨ№аӨҫаӨ®аҘҚаӨ°аҘӢ аӨёаӨ«аӨІаӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘӢ аҘӨ аӨ№аӨҫаӨ®аҘҖ аӨӨаӨӘаӨҫаӨҲаӨӮаӨ№аӨ°аҘҒаӨ•аҘӢ аӨЁаӨҝаӨ°аӨЁаҘҚаӨӨаӨ° аӨёаӨІаҘҚаӨІаӨҫаӨ№ аӨёаҘҒаӨқаӨҫаӨөаӨ•аҘӢ аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨӨаӨҝаӨ•аҘҚаӨ·аӨҫаӨ®аӨҫ аӨӣаҘҢ аҘӨ

аӨ®аҘҒаӨ–аҘҚаӨҜаӨӨаӨҜаӨҫ аӨҜаӨё аӨҹаӨҝаӨӯаҘҖаӨ®аӨҫ аӨ°аӨҫаӨңаӨЁаҘҲаӨӨаӨҝаӨ•, аӨҶаӨ°аҘҚаӨҘаӨҝаӨ•, аӨёаӨҫаӨӮаӨёаҘҚаӨ•аҘғаӨӨаӨҝаӨ• аӨӨаӨҘаӨҫ аӨёаӨ®аӨёаӨҫаӨ®аӨҜаӨҝаӨ• аӨөаӨҝаӨ·аӨҜаӨ®аӨҫ аӨёаӨ®аҘҚаӨ¬аӨЁаҘҚаӨ§аӨҝаӨӨ аӨөаҘҚаӨҜаӨ•аҘҚаӨӨаӨҝаӨёаӨҒаӨ—  аӨ—аӨ°аҘҖаӨҸаӨ•аҘӢ аӨ•аҘҒаӨ°аӨҫаӨ•аӨҫаӨЁаҘҖ, аӨӨаӨҘаӨҫ аӨёаӨ®аӨҫаӨҡаӨҫаӨ°аӨ®аҘӮаӨІаӨ• аӨёаӨҫаӨ®аӨҫаӨ—аҘҚаӨ°аҘҖ  аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨ¶аӨҫаӨ°аӨЈ аӨ—аӨ°аӨҝаӨЁаҘҚаӨӣ аҘӨ аӨ№аӨҫаӨ®аҘҖаӨІаҘҮ аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨ¶аӨҫаӨ°аӨЈ аӨ—аӨ°аҘҮаӨ•аӨҫ аӨёаӨҫаӨ®аӨҫаӨ—аҘҚаӨ°аҘҖаӨІаҘҮ аӨёаӨ®аӨҫаӨң аӨ°аҘҒаӨӘаӨҫаӨЁаҘҚаӨӨаӨ°аӨЈаӨ®аӨҫ аӨ…аӨ№аӨ®аҘҚ аӨӯаҘӮаӨ®аӨҝаӨ•аӨҫ аӨ–аҘҮаӨІаҘҚаӨЁаҘҮаӨӣ аӨӯаӨЁаҘҚаӨЁаҘҮ аӨ№аӨҫаӨ®аҘҚаӨ°аҘӢ аӨ…аӨӘаҘҮаӨ•аҘҚаӨ·аӨҫ аӨ°аӨ№аҘҮаӨ•аҘӢ аӨӣ аҘӨ аӨҜаӨёаӨ•аӨҫ аӨІаӨҫаӨ—аӨҝ аӨӨаӨӘаӨҫаӨҲаӨ№аӨ°аҘҒаӨ•аҘӢ аӨ¬аӨІаӨҝаӨҜаҘӢ аӨёаӨҫаӨҘ аӨЁаҘҲ аӨ№аӨҫаӨ®аҘҚаӨ°аҘӢ аӨёаӨ«аӨІаӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘӢ аҘӨ аӨ№аӨҫаӨ®аҘҖ аӨӨаӨӘаӨҫаӨҲаӨӮаӨ№аӨ°аҘҒаӨ•аҘӢ аӨЁаӨҝаӨ°аӨЁаҘҚаӨӨаӨ° аӨёаӨІаҘҚаӨІаӨҫаӨ№ аӨёаҘҒаӨқаӨҫаӨөаӨ•аҘӢ аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨӨаӨҝаӨ•аҘҚаӨ·аӨҫаӨ®аӨҫ аӨӣаҘҢ аҘӨ

snippet.title: [Hindi] BGIS 2026 | SEMI FINALS | Day 1 #BGMILIVE #BGIS
snippet.description:
The SEMI FINALS of BGIS 2026 begin.

The competition tightens. The stakes rise. There is no margin for error now.

After battling through The Grind, Round stages, Quarter Finals and Wildcard, only the strongest remain. Every match carries weight. Every fight moves teams one step closer to the Grand Finals.

This is where contenders turn into finalists.

Watch the SEMI FINALS live and witness who takes the next step toward the championship stage.

snippet.title: Minecraft Speedrunner VS 6 Hunters
snippet.description:
Minecraft Speedrunner VS 6 Hunters. You asked for it. The continuation of the series. This was absolutely insane.

Follow my socials:
вһҪ Twitter - @dream
вһҪ Instagram - @dreamwastaken
вһҪ Snapchat - @dreampublic

Merch: https://dream.shop

BadBoyHalo: @thesaintsofgames 
George: @GeorgeNotFound 
Sapnap: @Sapnap 
Antfrost: @Antfrost 
awesamdude: @awesamdude 
CaptainPuffy: @CaptainPuffy 

We decided to call this series Minecraft Manhunt. This video is a different rendition of it, where there are SIX hunters instead of THREE hunters or just one.

This is a new Minecraft but, 1.21.11 challenge that we have decided to try. I try to beat the game, while my friend George AND my friend Sapnap AND my friend BadBoyHalo AND my friend Antfrost AND my friend awesamdude AND my friend CaptainPuffy tries to prevent me from doing it. It's a race, and it's super intense and we had a lot of laughs. I love doing these challenges.

If this video gets 500,000 likes we'll do a rematch!

Not Minecraft, But Water Rises or Minecraft, But Lava Rises, or any other but challenge like that. This is a speed run / speed runner of Minecraft against a killer / assassin

#MinecraftManhunt

cs.title: Minecraft Speedrunner VS 6 LovcЕҜ
cs.description:
Minecraft Speedrunner VS 6 LovcЕҜ. Еҳekli jste si o to. PokraДҚovГЎnГӯ sГ©rie. Tohle bylo naprosto ЕЎГӯlenГ©. 

Sledujte me sociГЎlnГӯ sГӯtДӣ: 
вһҪ Twitter - @Dream
вһҪ Instagram - @Dreamwastaken
вһҪ Snapchat - @Dreampublic

Merch: https://dream.shop/

BadBoyHalo:  @thesaintsofgames
George:  @GeorgeNotFound
Sapnap:  @Sapnap
Antfrost:  @Antfrost
awesamdude:  @awesamdude
CaptainPuffy:  @CaptainPuffy

Rozhodli jsme se tuto sГ©rii nazvat Minecraft Manhunt. Tohle video je jinГ© provedenГӯ, kde je Е EST lovcЕҜ mГӯsto TЕҳГҚ lovcЕҜ nebo jen jednoho. 

Tohle je novГЎ вҖңMinecraft, aleвҖҰвҖқ challenge v 1.21.11, kterou jsme se rozhodli vyzkouЕЎet. SnaЕҫГӯm se vyhrГЎt, zatГӯmco se mi to mЕҜj kamarГЎd George A mЕҜj kamarГЎd Sapnap A mЕҜj kamarГЎd BadBoyHalo A mЕҜj kamarГЎd Antfrost A mЕҜj kamarГЎd awesamdude A moje kamarГЎdka CaptainPuffy snaЕҫГӯ pЕҷekazit. Je to super intenzivnГӯ zГЎvod, bДӣhem kterГ©ho jsme se hodnДӣ nasmГЎli. ZboЕҫЕҲuju tyto vГҪzvy. 

KdyЕҫ tohle video zГӯskГЎ 500 000 likЕҜ, tak udДӣlГЎme rematch! 

Ne вҖңMinecraft, ale zvedГЎ se hladina vodyвҖқ nebo вҖңMinecraft, ale zvedГЎ se hladina lГЎvyвҖқ, ani ЕҫГЎdnГЎ podobnГЎ challenge. Tohle je Minecraft speedrun / speedrunner proti zabijГЎkovi / vrahovi 

#MinecraftManhunt

ta.title: Minecraft Speedrunner VS 6 Hunters
ta.description:
Minecraft Speedrunner VS 6 Hunters. а®ЁаҜҖа®ҷаҜҚа®•а®іаҜҚ а®…а®ӨаҜҲа®•аҜҚ а®•аҜҮа®ҹаҜҚа®ҹаҜҖа®°аҜҚа®•а®іаҜҚ. а®ӨаҜҠа®ҹа®°а®ҝа®©аҜҚ а®ӨаҜҠа®ҹа®°аҜҚа®ҡаҜҚа®ҡа®ҝ. а®Үа®ӨаҜҒ а®®аҜҒа®ұаҜҚа®ұа®ҝа®ІаҜҒа®®аҜҚ а®ӘаҜҲа®ӨаҜҚа®Өа®ҝа®Ҝа®•аҜҚа®•а®ҫа®°а®ӨаҜҚа®Өа®©а®®а®ҫа®• а®Үа®°аҜҒа®ЁаҜҚа®Өа®ӨаҜҒ.

а®Һа®©а®ӨаҜҒ а®ҡа®®аҜӮа®• а®Ҡа®ҹа®•а®ҷаҜҚа®•а®іаҜҲа®ӘаҜҚ а®Әа®ҝа®©аҜҚа®ӨаҜҠа®ҹа®°а®өаҜҒа®®аҜҚ:
вһҪ Twitter - @Dream
вһҪ Instagram - @Dreamwastaken
вһҪ Snapchat - @Dreampublic

Merch: https://dream.shop/

BadBoyHalo: @thesaintsofgames
George: @GeorgeNotFound
Sapnap: @Sapnap
Antfrost: @Antfrost
awesamdude: @awesamdude
CaptainPuffy: @CaptainPuffy

а®Үа®ЁаҜҚа®Өа®ӨаҜҚ а®ӨаҜҠа®ҹа®°аҜҲ Minecraft Manhunt а®Һа®©аҜҚа®ұаҜҒ а®…а®ҙаҜҲа®•аҜҚа®• а®®аҜҒа®ҹа®ҝа®өаҜҒ а®ҡаҜҶа®ҜаҜҚа®ӨаҜӢа®®аҜҚ. а®Үа®ЁаҜҚа®Ө а®өаҜҖа®ҹа®ҝа®ҜаҜӢ а®…а®Өа®©аҜҚ а®өа®ҝа®ӨаҜҚа®Өа®ҝа®Ҝа®ҫа®ҡа®®а®ҫа®© а®Әа®Өа®ҝа®ӘаҜҚа®Әа®ҫа®•аҜҒа®®аҜҚ, а®…а®ҷаҜҚа®•аҜҒ а®®аҜӮа®©аҜҚа®ұаҜҒ а®өаҜҮа®ҹаҜҚа®ҹаҜҲа®•аҜҚа®•а®ҫа®°а®°аҜҚа®•а®іаҜҒа®•аҜҚа®•аҜҒа®ӘаҜҚ а®Әа®Өа®ҝа®Іа®ҫа®• а®Ҷа®ұаҜҒ а®өаҜҮа®ҹаҜҚа®ҹаҜҲа®•аҜҚа®•а®ҫа®°а®°аҜҚа®•а®іаҜҚ а®…а®ІаҜҚа®Іа®ӨаҜҒ а®’а®°аҜҒа®өа®°аҜҚ а®®а®ҹаҜҚа®ҹаҜҒа®®аҜҮ а®үа®іаҜҚа®іа®©а®°аҜҚ.

а®Үа®ӨаҜҒ а®’а®°аҜҒ а®ӘаҜҒа®Өа®ҝа®Ҝ Minecraft а®Ҷа®©а®ҫа®ІаҜҚ, 1.21.11 а®ҡа®өа®ҫа®ІаҜҲ а®Ёа®ҫа®ҷаҜҚа®•а®іаҜҚ а®®аҜҒа®Ҝа®ұаҜҚа®ҡа®ҝа®•аҜҚа®• а®®аҜҒа®ҹа®ҝа®өаҜҒ а®ҡаҜҶа®ҜаҜҚа®ӨаҜҒа®іаҜҚа®іаҜӢа®®аҜҚ. а®Ёа®ҫа®©аҜҚ а®өа®ҝа®іаҜҲа®Ҝа®ҫа®ҹаҜҚа®ҹаҜҲ а®өаҜҶа®ІаҜҚа®І а®®аҜҒа®Ҝа®ұаҜҚа®ҡа®ҝа®•аҜҚа®•а®ҝа®ұаҜҮа®©аҜҚ, а®…а®ӨаҜҮ а®ЁаҜҮа®°а®ӨаҜҚа®Өа®ҝа®ІаҜҚ а®Һа®©аҜҚ а®Ёа®ЈаҜҚа®Әа®°аҜҚ а®ңа®ҫа®°аҜҚа®ңаҜҚ а®®а®ұаҜҚа®ұаҜҒа®®аҜҚ а®Һа®©аҜҚ а®Ёа®ЈаҜҚа®Әа®°аҜҚ а®ҡа®ӘаҜҚа®©а®ҫа®ӘаҜҚ а®®а®ұаҜҚа®ұаҜҒа®®аҜҚ а®Һа®©аҜҚ а®Ёа®ЈаҜҚа®Әа®°аҜҚ а®ӘаҜҮа®ҹаҜҚа®Әа®ҫа®ҜаҜҚа®№а®ҫа®ІаҜӢ а®®а®ұаҜҚа®ұаҜҒа®®аҜҚ а®Һа®©аҜҚ а®Ёа®ЈаҜҚа®Әа®°аҜҚ а®Ҷа®ЈаҜҚа®ҹаҜҚа®ға®ӘаҜҚа®°аҜӢа®ёаҜҚа®ҹаҜҚ а®®а®ұаҜҚа®ұаҜҒа®®аҜҚ а®Һа®©аҜҚ а®Ёа®ЈаҜҚа®Әа®°аҜҚ а®…а®өаҜҶа®ҡа®®аҜҚа®ҹаҜҒа®ҹаҜҚ а®®а®ұаҜҚа®ұаҜҒа®®аҜҚ а®Һа®©аҜҚ а®Ёа®ЈаҜҚа®Әа®°аҜҚ а®•аҜҮа®ӘаҜҚа®ҹа®©аҜҚ а®Әа®ға®Әа®ҝ а®Ёа®ҫа®©аҜҚ а®…а®ӨаҜҲа®ҡаҜҚ а®ҡаҜҶа®ҜаҜҚа®өа®ӨаҜҲа®ӨаҜҚ а®Өа®ҹаҜҒа®•аҜҚа®• а®®аҜҒа®Ҝа®ұаҜҚа®ҡа®ҝа®•аҜҚа®•а®ҝа®ұа®ҫа®°аҜҚа®•а®іаҜҚ. а®Үа®ӨаҜҒ а®’а®°аҜҒ а®Әа®ЁаҜҚа®Өа®Ҝа®®аҜҚ, а®Үа®ӨаҜҒ а®®а®ҝа®•а®өаҜҒа®®аҜҚ а®ӨаҜҖа®өа®ҝа®°а®®а®ҫа®©а®ӨаҜҒ, а®Һа®ҷаҜҚа®•а®іаҜҒа®•аҜҚа®•аҜҒ а®Ёа®ҝа®ұаҜҲа®Ҝ а®ҡа®ҝа®°а®ҝа®ӘаҜҚа®ӘаҜҒа®•а®іаҜҚ а®Үа®°аҜҒа®ЁаҜҚа®Өа®©. а®Үа®ЁаҜҚа®Ө а®ҡа®өа®ҫа®ІаҜҚа®•а®іаҜҲа®ҡаҜҚ а®ҡаҜҶа®ҜаҜҚа®өа®ӨаҜҒ а®Һа®©а®•аҜҚа®•аҜҒ а®®а®ҝа®•а®өаҜҒа®®аҜҚ а®Әа®ҝа®ҹа®ҝа®•аҜҚа®•аҜҒа®®аҜҚ.

а®Үа®ЁаҜҚа®Ө а®өаҜҖа®ҹа®ҝа®ҜаҜӢ 500,000 а®ІаҜҲа®•аҜҚа®•аҜҒа®•а®іаҜҲа®ӘаҜҚ а®ӘаҜҶа®ұаҜҚа®ұа®ҫа®ІаҜҚ, а®Ёа®ҫа®ҷаҜҚа®•а®іаҜҚ а®®аҜҖа®ЈаҜҚа®ҹаҜҒа®®аҜҚ а®’а®°аҜҒ а®ӘаҜӢа®ҹаҜҚа®ҹа®ҝа®ҜаҜҲ а®Ёа®ҹа®ӨаҜҚа®ӨаҜҒа®өаҜӢа®®аҜҚ!

it.title: Minecraft Speedrunner VS 6 Cacciatori
it.description:
Minecraft Speedrunner VS 6 Cacciatori. Lo avete chiesto. La continuazione della serie. Questo ГЁ stato assolutamente pazzesco.

Seguite i miei social:

George:  @GeorgeNotFound

awesamdude:  @awesamdude
CaptainPuffy:  @CaptainPuffy

Abbiamo deciso di chiamare questa serie Minecraft Manhunt. Questo video ГЁ una versione diversa, in cui ci sono SEI cacciatori invece di TRE o solo uno.

Questa ГЁ una nuova sfida Minecraft Ma, versione 1.21.11, che abbiamo deciso di provare. Io cerco di completare il gioco, mentre il mio amico George, il mio amico Sapnap, il mio amico BadBoyHalo, il mio amico Antfrost, il mio amico awesamdude e la mia amica CaptainPuffy cercano di impedirmi di farlo. ГҲ una gara, ГЁ super intensa e ci siamo divertiti un sacco. Adoro queste sfide.

Se questo video ottiene 500.000 like, faremo una rivincita!

Non Minecraft, ma Water Rises o Minecraft, ma Lava Rises, o qualsiasi altra sfida simile. Si tratta di una speed run / speed runner di Minecraft contro un killer / assassino.

te.title: Minecraft Speedrunner VS 6 Hunters
te.description:
Minecraft Speedrunner VS 6 Hunters. а°®аұҖа°°аұҒ а°Ұа°ҫа°Ёа°ҝ а°•аұӢа°ёа°Ӯ а°…а°Ўа°ҝа°—а°ҫа°°аұҒ. а°ёа°ҝа°°аұҖа°ёаұҚ а°•аұҠа°Ёа°ёа°ҫа°—а°ҝа°Ӯа°ӘаұҒ. а°Үа°Ұа°ҝ а°ӘаұӮа°°аұҚа°Өа°ҝа°—а°ҫ а°Әа°ҝа°ҡаұҚа°ҡа°ҝа°—а°ҫ а°үа°Ӯа°Ұа°ҝ.

а°Ёа°ҫ а°ёаұӢа°·а°ІаұҚ а°®аұҖа°Ўа°ҝа°Ҝа°ҫа°ЁаұҒ а°…а°ЁаұҒа°ёа°°а°ҝа°Ӯа°ҡа°Ӯа°Ўа°ҝ:
вһҪ Twitter - @Dream
вһҪ Instagram - @Dreamwastaken
вһҪ Snapchat - @Dreampublic

Merch: https://dream.shop/

BadBoyHalo: @thesaintsofgames
George: @GeorgeNotFound
Sapnap: @Sapnap
Antfrost: @Antfrost
awesamdude: @awesamdude
CaptainPuffy: @CaptainPuffy

а°®аұҮа°®аұҒ а°Ҳ а°ёа°ҝа°°аұҖа°ёаұҚвҖҢа°ЁаұҒ Minecraft Manhunt а°…а°Ёа°ҝ а°Әа°ҝа°Іа°өа°ҫа°Іа°Ёа°ҝ а°Ёа°ҝа°°аұҚа°Ја°Ҝа°ҝа°Ӯа°ҡаұҒа°•аұҒа°ЁаұҚа°Ёа°ҫа°®аұҒ. а°Ҳ а°өаұҖа°Ўа°ҝа°ҜаұӢ а°Ұа°ҫа°Ёа°ҝ а°ҜаұҠа°•аұҚа°• а°ӯа°ҝа°ЁаұҚа°Ёа°®аұҲа°Ё а°өаұҶа°°аұҚа°·а°ЁаұҚ, а°Үа°•аұҚа°•а°Ў а°®аұҒа°—аұҚа°—аұҒа°°аұҒ а°өаұҮа°ҹа°—а°ҫа°іаұҚа°іаұҒ а°ІаұҮа°Ұа°ҫ а°’а°•а°°аұҒ а°®а°ҫа°ӨаұҚа°°а°®аұҮ а°•а°ҫа°•аұҒа°Ӯа°Ўа°ҫ а°Ҷа°°аұҒа°—аұҒа°°аұҒ а°өаұҮа°ҹа°—а°ҫа°іаұҚа°іаұҒ а°үа°ЁаұҚа°Ёа°ҫа°°аұҒ.

а°Үа°Ұа°ҝ а°•аұҠа°ӨаұҚа°Ө Minecraft а°•а°ҫа°ЁаұҖ, 1.21.11 а°ёа°өа°ҫа°ІаұҒа°ЁаұҒ а°®аұҮа°®аұҒ а°ӘаұҚа°°а°Ҝа°ӨаұҚа°Ёа°ҝа°Ӯа°ҡа°ҫа°Іа°Ёа°ҝ а°Ёа°ҝа°°аұҚа°Ја°Ҝа°ҝа°Ӯа°ҡаұҒа°•аұҒа°ЁаұҚа°Ёа°ҫа°®аұҒ. а°ЁаұҮа°ЁаұҒ а°Ҷа°ҹа°ІаұӢ а°—аұҶа°Іа°өа°Ўа°ҫа°Ёа°ҝа°•а°ҝ а°ӘаұҚа°°а°Ҝа°ӨаұҚа°Ёа°ҝа°ёаұҚа°Өа°ҫа°ЁаұҒ, а°Ёа°ҫ а°ёаұҚа°ЁаұҮа°№а°ҝа°ӨаұҒа°ЎаұҒ а°ңа°ҫа°°аұҚа°ңаұҚ а°®а°°а°ҝа°ҜаұҒ а°Ёа°ҫ а°ёаұҚа°ЁаұҮа°№а°ҝа°ӨаұҒа°ЎаұҒ а°ёа°ӘаұҚа°Ёа°ҫа°ӘаұҚ а°®а°°а°ҝа°ҜаұҒ а°Ёа°ҫ а°ёаұҚа°ЁаұҮа°№а°ҝа°ӨаұҒа°ЎаұҒ а°¬а°ҫа°ЎаұҚвҖҢа°¬а°ҫа°ҜаұҚвҖҢа°№а°ҫа°ІаұӢ а°®а°°а°ҝа°ҜаұҒ а°Ёа°ҫ а°ёаұҚа°ЁаұҮа°№а°ҝа°ӨаұҒа°ЎаұҒ а°Ҷа°Ӯа°ҹаұҚвҖҢа°«аұҚа°°а°ҫа°ёаұҚа°ҹаұҚ а°®а°°а°ҝа°ҜаұҒ а°Ёа°ҫ а°ёаұҚа°ЁаұҮа°№а°ҝа°ӨаұҒа°ЎаұҒ а°…а°ҰаұҚа°ӯаұҒа°Өа°Ӯ а°®а°°а°ҝа°ҜаұҒ а°Ёа°ҫ а°ёаұҚа°ЁаұҮа°№а°ҝа°ӨаұҒа°ЎаұҒ а°•аұҶа°ӘаұҚа°ҹаұҶа°ЁаұҚвҖҢа°Әа°«аұҖ а°Ёа°ЁаұҚа°ЁаұҒ а°…а°Іа°ҫ а°ҡаұҮа°Ҝа°•аұҒа°Ӯа°Ўа°ҫ а°Ёа°ҝа°°аұӢа°§а°ҝа°Ӯа°ҡа°Ўа°ҫа°Ёа°ҝа°•а°ҝ а°ӘаұҚа°°а°Ҝа°ӨаұҚа°Ёа°ҝа°ёаұҚа°Өа°ҫа°°аұҒ. а°Үа°Ұа°ҝ а°’а°• а°°аұҮа°ёаұҒ, а°®а°°а°ҝа°ҜаұҒ а°Үа°Ұа°ҝ а°ҡа°ҫа°Іа°ҫ а°ӨаұҖа°өаұҚа°°а°Ӯа°—а°ҫ а°үа°Ӯа°ҹаұҒа°Ӯа°Ұа°ҝ а°®а°°а°ҝа°ҜаұҒ а°®аұҮа°®аұҒ а°ҡа°ҫа°Іа°ҫ а°Ёа°өаұҚа°өаұҒа°•аұҒа°ЁаұҚа°Ёа°ҫа°®аұҒ. а°Ҳ а°ёа°өа°ҫа°іаұҚа°Іа°ЁаұҒ а°ҡаұҮа°Ҝа°Ўа°Ӯ а°Ёа°ҫа°•аұҒ а°ҡа°ҫа°Іа°ҫ а°Үа°·аұҚа°ҹа°Ӯ.

а°Ҳ а°өаұҖа°Ўа°ҝа°ҜаұӢа°•аұҒ 500,000 а°ІаұҲа°•аұҚвҖҢа°ІаұҒ а°өа°ёаұҚа°ӨаұҮ, а°®а°Ёа°Ӯ а°Өа°ҝа°°а°ҝа°—а°ҝ а°®аұҚа°Ҝа°ҫа°ҡаұҚ а°ҡаұҮа°ёаұҚа°Өа°ҫа°®аұҒ!

а°®аұҲа°ЁаұҚвҖҢа°•аұҚа°°а°ҫа°«аұҚа°ҹаұҚ а°•а°ҫа°ҰаұҒ, а°•а°ҫа°ЁаұҖ а°өа°ҫа°ҹа°°аұҚ а°°аұҲа°ңаұҶа°ёаұҚ а°ІаұҮа°Ұа°ҫ а°®аұҲа°ЁаұҚвҖҢа°•аұҚа°°а°ҫа°«аұҚа°ҹаұҚ, а°•а°ҫа°ЁаұҖ а°Іа°ҫа°өа°ҫ а°°аұҲа°ңаұҶа°ёаұҚ, а°ІаұҮа°Ұа°ҫ а°®а°°аұҮа°ҰаұҲа°Ёа°ҫ а°•а°ҫа°ЁаұҖ а°…а°Іа°ҫа°Ӯа°ҹа°ҝ а°ёа°өа°ҫа°ІаұҒ. а°Үа°Ұа°ҝ а°•а°ҝа°ІаұҚа°Іа°°аұҚ / а°№а°Ӯа°Өа°•аұҒа°Ўа°ҝа°ӘаұҲ а°®аұҲа°ЁаұҚвҖҢа°•аұҚа°°а°ҫа°«аұҚа°ҹаұҚ а°ҜаұҠа°•аұҚа°• а°ёаұҚа°ӘаұҖа°ЎаұҚ а°°а°ЁаұҚ / а°ёаұҚа°ӘаұҖа°ЎаұҚ а°°а°ЁаұҚа°Ёа°°аұҚ.

da.title: Minecraft Speedrunner VS 6 Huntere
da.description:
Minecraft Speedrunner VS 6 Huntere. I bad om det. FortsГҰttelsen af вҖӢвҖӢserien. Det her var fuldstГҰndig vanvittigt.

FГёlg mine sociale medier:
вһҪ Twitter - @Dream
вһҪ Instagram - @Dreamwastaken
вһҪ Snapchat - @Dreampublic

Varer: https://dream.shop/

BadBoyHalo: @thesaintsofgames
George: @GeorgeNotFound
Sapnap: @Sapnap
Antfrost: @Antfrost
awesamdude: @awesamdude
CaptainPuffy: @CaptainPuffy

Vi besluttede os for at kalde denne serie for Minecraft Manhunt. Denne video er en anderledes udgave af det, hvor der er SEKS huntere i stedet for TRE huntere eller kun Г©n.

Dette er en ny Minecraft, men 1.16 udfordring, som vi har besluttet at prГёve. Jeg prГёver at gennemfГёre spillet, mens min ven George OG min ven Sapnap OG min ven BadBoyHalo OG min ven Antfrost OG min ven awesamdude OG min ven CaptainPuffy prГёver at forhindre mig i at gГёre det. Det er et kaplГёb, og det er super intenst, og vi havde en masse grin. Jeg elsker at lave disse udfordringer.

Hvis denne video fГҘr 500.000 likes, laver vi en revanchekamp!

Ikke Minecraft, men vandet stiger eller Minecraft, men Lava stiger, eller enhver anden udfordring end den slags. Dette er et speed run/speed runner af Minecraft mod en morder/snigmorder.

#MinecraftManhunt

tr.description:
Minecraft Manhunt VS 6 AvcДұ. Siz istediniz, iЕҹte serinin devamДұ. Bu kesinlikle Г§ДұlgДұncaydДұ.

Sosyal medya hesaplarДұmДұ takip edin:

CaptainPuffy: @CaptainPuffy

Bu seriye Minecraft Manhunt adДұnДұ verdik. Bu video, ГјГ§ avcДұ veya sadece bir avcДұ yerine altДұ avcДұnДұn olduДҹu farklДұ bir versiyonu.

Bu, denemeye karar verdiДҹimiz yeni bir Minecraft 1.21.11 challengeвҖҷДұ. Ben oyunu bitirmeye Г§alДұЕҹДұrken, arkadaЕҹДұm George, arkadaЕҹДұm Sapnap, arkadaЕҹДұm BadBoyHalo, arkadaЕҹДұm Antfrost, arkadaЕҹДұm awesamdude ve arkadaЕҹДұm CaptainPuffy beni durdurmaya Г§alДұЕҹДұyor. Bu bir yarДұЕҹ ve Г§ok heyecanlДұydДұ, Г§ok gГјldГјk. Bu tГјr challengeвҖҷlarДұ yapmayДұ Г§ok seviyorum.

Bu video 500.000 beДҹeni alДұrsa, rГ¶vanЕҹ yapacaДҹДұz!

Bu Minecraft, Ama Su YГјkseliyor veya Minecraft, Ama Lav YГјkseliyor challengeвҖҷlarДұ gibi deДҹil. Bu, MinecraftвҖҷta yapДұlan bir speedrun/speedruner ile bir katil/suikastГ§i arasДұndaki mГјcadele.

аҰ®аҰҫаҰҮаҰЁаҰ•а§ҚаҰ°аҰҫаҰ«а§ҚаҰҹ  аҰёа§ҚаҰӘаҰҝаҰЎаҰ°аҰҫаҰЁаҰҫаҰ° аҰӯаҰҫаҰ°а§ҚаҰёа§ҮаҰё а§¬ аҰңаҰЁ аҰ№аҰҫаҰЁа§ҚаҰҹаҰҫаҰ°аҘӨ аҰӨа§ӢаҰ®аҰ°аҰҫ аҰҸаҰҹаҰҫ аҰҡа§ҮаҰҜаҰја§ҮаҰӣаҰҝаҰІа§ҮаҘӨ аҰёаҰҝаҰ°аҰҝаҰңа§ҮаҰ° аҰӘа§ҒаҰЁаҰ°аҰңа§ҖаҰ¬аҰЁаҘӨ аҰҸаҰ•аҰҹаҰҫ аҰ…аҰӨа§ҚаҰҜаҰЁа§ҚаҰӨ аҰҡаҰ®а§ҺаҰ•аҰҫаҰ° аҰӣаҰҝаҰІаҘӨ

вһҪ аҰёа§ҚаҰЁа§ҚаҰҜаҰҫаҰӘаҰҡа§ҚаҰҜаҰҫаҰҹ- @unknown-rolepublic

аҰӘаҰЈа§ҚаҰҜаҰёаҰҫаҰ®аҰ—а§ҚаҰ°а§Җ: https://dream.shop/

аҰёа§ҚаҰҜаҰҫаҰӘаҰЁа§ҚаҰҜаҰҫаҰӘ:  @Sapnap
аҰ…а§ҚаҰҜаҰҫаҰЁа§ҚаҰҹаҰ«а§ҚаҰ°аҰёа§ҚаҰҹ:  @Antfrost
аҰ…аҰёаҰ®аҰЎа§ҒаҰЎ:  @awesamdude
аҰ•а§ҚаҰҜаҰҫаҰӘа§ҚаҰҹа§ҮаҰЁ аҰӘаҰҫаҰ«аҰҝ:  @CaptainPuffy

аҰҶаҰ®аҰ°аҰҫ аҰҸаҰҮ аҰёаҰҝаҰ°аҰҝаҰңаҰ•а§Ү аҰ®аҰҫаҰҮаҰЁаҰ•а§ҚаҰ°аҰҫаҰ«а§ҚаҰҹ аҰ®а§ҚаҰҜаҰҫаҰЁаҰ№аҰҫаҰЁа§ҚаҰҹ аҰ¬аҰІаҰҫаҰ° аҰёаҰҝаҰҰа§ҚаҰ§аҰҫаҰЁа§ҚаҰӨ аҰЁаҰҝаҰҜаҰја§ҮаҰӣаҰҝ аҘӨ аҰҸаҰҮ  аҰӯаҰҝаҰЎаҰҝаҰ“аҰҹаҰҝ аҰ•аҰҫаҰ°аҰҝ аҰҶаҰ°а§ҮаҰ• аҰ°а§ӮаҰӘ, аҰҜа§ҮаҰ–аҰҫаҰЁа§Ү а§¬ аҰңаҰЁ аҰ№аҰҫаҰЁа§ҚаҰҹаҰҫаҰ° аҰҶаҰӣа§Ү аҰҡа§ҖаҰЁ аҰ…аҰҘаҰ¬аҰҫ аҰҸаҰ•аҰңаҰЁа§ҮаҰ° аҰ¬аҰҰаҰІа§ҮаҘӨ
аҰҸаҰҹаҰҝ аҰҸаҰ•аҰҹаҰҝ аҰЁаҰӨа§ҒаҰЁ Minecraft 1.21.11 аҰҡа§ҚаҰҜаҰҫаҰІа§ҮаҰһа§ҚаҰң аҰҜаҰҫ аҰҶаҰ®аҰ°аҰҫ аҰҡа§ҮаҰ·а§ҚаҰҹаҰҫ аҰ•аҰ°аҰҫаҰ° аҰёаҰҝаҰҰа§ҚаҰ§аҰҫаҰЁа§ҚаҰӨ аҰЁаҰҝа§ҹа§ҮаҰӣаҰҝаҘӨ аҰҶаҰ®аҰҝ аҰ—а§ҮаҰ®аҰҹаҰҝ аҰңа§ҮаҰӨаҰҫаҰ° аҰҡа§ҮаҰ·а§ҚаҰҹаҰҫ аҰ•аҰ°аҰҝ, аҰҶаҰ° аҰҶаҰ®аҰҫаҰ° аҰ¬аҰЁа§ҚаҰ§а§Ғ аҰңаҰ°а§ҚаҰң, аҰёа§ҚаҰҜаҰҫаҰӘаҰЁа§ҚаҰҜаҰҫаҰӘ, аҰ¬а§ҚаҰҜаҰҫаҰЎаҰ¬а§ҹаҰ№а§ҮаҰІа§Ӣ, аҰ…а§ҚаҰҜаҰҫаҰЁа§ҚаҰҹаҰ«а§ҚаҰ°аҰёа§ҚаҰҹ, аҰ…аҰёаҰ®аҰЎа§ҒаҰЎ аҰҸаҰ¬аҰӮ аҰ•а§ҚаҰҜаҰҫаҰӘа§ҚаҰҹа§ҮаҰЁ аҰӘаҰҫаҰ«аҰҝ аҰҶаҰ®аҰҫаҰ•а§Ү аҰ¬аҰҫаҰ§аҰҫ аҰҰа§ҮаҰ“а§ҹаҰҫаҰ° аҰҡа§ҮаҰ·а§ҚаҰҹаҰҫ аҰ•аҰ°а§ҮаҘӨ аҰҸаҰҹаҰҝ аҰ®а§ӮаҰІаҰӨ аҰҸаҰ•аҰҹаҰҝ аҰҰа§Ңа§ң аҰӘа§ҚаҰ°аҰӨаҰҝаҰҜа§ӢаҰ—аҰҝаҰӨаҰҫ, аҰҸаҰҹаҰҝ аҰ…аҰӨа§ҚаҰҜаҰЁа§ҚаҰӨ аҰүаҰӨа§ҚаҰӨа§ҮаҰңаҰЁаҰҫаҰӘа§ӮаҰ°а§ҚаҰЈ аҰӣаҰҝаҰІ аҰҸаҰ¬аҰӮ аҰҶаҰ®аҰ°аҰҫ аҰӘа§ҚаҰ°аҰҡа§ҒаҰ° аҰ®аҰңаҰҫ аҰ•аҰ°а§ҮаҰӣаҰҝаҘӨ аҰҶаҰ®аҰҝ аҰҸаҰҮ аҰ§аҰ°аҰЁа§ҮаҰ° аҰҡа§ҚаҰҜаҰҫаҰІа§ҮаҰһа§ҚаҰңаҰ—а§ҒаҰІа§Ӣ аҰ•аҰ°аҰӨа§Ү аҰ–а§ҒаҰ¬ аҰӘаҰӣаҰЁа§ҚаҰҰ аҰ•аҰ°аҰҝаҘӨ
аҰҜаҰҰаҰҝ аҰҸаҰҮ аҰӯаҰҝаҰЎаҰҝаҰ“аҰӨа§Ү а§«а§Ұа§Ұ,а§Ұа§Ұа§Ұ аҰІаҰҫаҰҮаҰ• аҰӘа§ңа§Ү, аҰӨаҰ¬а§Ү аҰҶаҰ®аҰ°аҰҫ аҰҶаҰ¬аҰҫаҰ° аҰҸаҰ° аҰҸаҰ•аҰҹаҰҝ аҰ«аҰҝаҰ°аҰӨаҰҝ аҰ®а§ҚаҰҜаҰҫаҰҡ  аҰ–а§ҮаҰІаҰ¬!
аҰҸаҰҹаҰҝ "аҰ®аҰҫаҰҮаҰЁаҰ•а§ҚаҰ°аҰҫаҰ«аҰҹ, аҰ•аҰҝаҰЁа§ҚаҰӨа§Ғ аҰңаҰІ аҰ¬аҰҫа§ңаҰӣа§Ү" аҰ¬аҰҫ "аҰ®аҰҫаҰҮаҰЁаҰ•а§ҚаҰ°аҰҫаҰ«аҰҹ, аҰ•аҰҝаҰЁа§ҚаҰӨа§Ғ аҰІаҰҫаҰӯаҰҫ аҰ¬аҰҫа§ңаҰӣа§Ү"вҖ”аҰҸаҰҮ аҰ§аҰ°аҰЈа§ҮаҰ° аҰ•а§ӢаҰЁа§Ӣ аҰҡа§ҚаҰҜаҰҫаҰІа§ҮаҰһа§ҚаҰң аҰЁа§ҹаҘӨ аҰҸаҰҹаҰҝ аҰҸаҰ•аҰңаҰЁ аҰ–а§ҒаҰЁаҰҝ аҰ¬аҰҫ аҰҶаҰӨаҰӨаҰҫа§ҹа§ҖаҰ° аҰ¬аҰҝаҰ°а§ҒаҰҰа§ҚаҰ§а§Ү аҰ®аҰҫаҰҮаҰЁаҰ•а§ҚаҰ°аҰҫаҰ«аҰҹа§ҮаҰ° аҰҸаҰ•аҰңаҰЁ аҰёа§ҚаҰӘаҰҝаҰЎаҰ°аҰҫаҰЁаҰҫаҰ°-аҰҸаҰ° аҰҹаҰҝаҰ•а§Ү аҰҘаҰҫаҰ•аҰҫаҰ° аҰІа§ңаҰҫаҰҮаҘӨ

вһҪ Instagram - @Dreamwastaken
вһҪ Snapchat - @Dreampublic

Merchandise: https://dream.shop/

BadBoyHalo:  @thesaintsofgames
George:  @GeorgeNotFound
Sapnap:  @Sapnap
Antfrost:  @Antfrost
awesamdude:  @awesamdude
CaptainPuffy:  @CaptainPuffy

Wir haben diese Serie "Minecraft Manhunt" genannt. Dieses Video ist eine etwas andere Version davon: Es gibt SECHS JГӨger anstelle von nur DREI JГӨgern oder nur einem.

Das ist eine neue "Minecraft, aber" Herausforderung, in Version 1.21.11, die wir ausprobieren. Ich versuche, das Spiel zu besiegen, wГӨhrend mein Freund George UND mein Freund Sapnap UND mein Freund BadBoyHalo UND mein Freund Antfrost UND mein Freund Awesamdude UND meine Freundin CpatainPuffy versuchen, mich daran zu hindern. Es ist ein Wettlauf, super spannend und wir haben jede Menge gelacht. Ich liebe diese Herausforderungen.

Wenn dieses Video 500.000 Likes bekommt, wird es ein Rematch geben!

Nicht etwa "Minecraft, aber Wasser steigt" oder "Minecraft, aber Lava steigt" oder irgendeine ГӨhnliche "aber" Herausforderung. Dies ist ein Speedrun / Minecraft Speedrunner gegen einen Killer/Assassinen.

#MinecraftManhunt

snippet.title: Lauv - I Like Me Better
snippet.description:
Lauv - I Like Me Better

(Lyrics)
[Verse 1]
To be young and in love in New York City
To not know who I am but still know that I'm good long as you're here with me
To be drunk and in love in New York City
Midnight into morning coffee
Burnin' through the hours talkin' (Damn)

[Chorus]
I like me better when I'm with you
I like me better when I'm with you
I knew from the first time
I'd stay for a long time 'cause
I like me better when
I like me better when I'm with you

[Drop]

[Verse 2]
I don't know what it is, but I got that feelin'
Wakin' up in this bed next to you, swear the room, yeah, it got no ceilin'
If we lay, let the day just pass us by
I might get to too much talkin'
I might have to tell you somethin' (Damn)

[Chorus]
I like me better when I'm with you
I like me better when I'm with you
I knew from the first time
I'd stay for a long time 'cause
I like me better when
I like me better when I'm with you

[Drop]

[Bridge]
Stay awhile, stay awhile, stay here with me
Stay awhile, stay awhile, oh
Stay awhile, stay awhile, stay here with me
Lay here with me, ayy, ayy, ooh

[Chorus]
I like me better when I'm with you (Yes, I do, yes, I do, baby)
I like me better when I'm with you (Oh no)
I knew from the first time
I'd stay for a long time 'cause
I like me better when
I like me better when I'm with you

[Outro]
(I like me, I like me)
(Look who you made me, made me, oh no)
Better when
I like me better when I'm with you

Tags:
I Like Me Better Lyrics
Lauv I Like Me Better
I Like Me Better Lauv
Stay awhile stay awhile stay here with me
Lay here with me ayy ayy ooh
I like me better when I'm with you
I like me better
When I'm with you
I knew from the first time
I'd stay for a long time 'cause
I like me better when
I like me better when I am with you
I Like Me Better

#Lauv #ILikeMeBetter #Lyrics 

Contact: droppinglyricsvibe@gmail.com

snippet.title: TIMRO LOOKS - Rinmorin ft. KBABI (Official Music Video) Prod. itsriken
snippet.description:
TIMRO LOOKS - Rinmorin ft. KBABI (Official Music Video) Prod. Itsriken 
вҺҜвҺҜвҺҜвҺҜвҺҜвҺҜвҺҜвҺҜвҺҜвҺҜвҺҜвҺҜвҺҜвҺҜвҺҜвҺҜвҺҜвҺҜвҺҜ
вҖңTIMRO LOOKSвҖқ is a rap song with a flirty mood, talking about that one girl whose looks and vibe keep running through my mindвҷӘ

Official Audio - https://youtu.be/hMIDW5HUY08?si=OMalmwP6kpg-L5n5

lyrics...

HOOK *
TIMRO LOOKS ATII BANGER
MERO HOOK TIMI SAMPLE 
TIMRO LOOKS ATII BANGER 
ATOM BOOM VANDA DANGER 
                     X2

Rinmorin - Verse 
HEJO SAAMA MALAI BAAL THYNA 
KASAI KO YHA JABA TIMLAI DEKHY MERO 
MUKH BATA DAMM GRIL 

LUKI LUKI HERNY BANI LAGYO TIMI LAI 
MA NAJIKINA KHOJE TARA KADA UMRYO JHYAN VAARRR

HALKA GARIDAUNA BATH 
ABO CHAIYO TIMRO SAATH DIYE 
CHODINA YO HAAT JHUTO  BOLE 
VANY MARI JAAUU

MUTU VETRA JAMMA 4 WOTA THAU 
HUNXA 
2 THAUMA TIMI RA MAH  2 THAUMA 
AAMA BAAU

RAKHI SAKE TIMLAI AARU VANDA MATHI 
AAKHA LAUNY TORI HARKO HAAT KHUTAA
VAACHDINXU MAAA

AARU VANDA NIKAI FARK XU MAH BAAL SANGAI  BUDHI ANI BAAG JASTI AATI XU MAAH 
TIMI 
XAUMA HUDA KAILY AATIN XA MAANN
JHUTO BOLYA HOINA  NASALU CHJJJ KHADINA MA
JALMA
 PARISAKE KEBAL HAAT DINUU LAAAA
ABO BAKI KURA PANDIT LAI RAKHDINXU MA TIMRO 

 LACHKINY KAAMR KO 36 KO number 
NA LAJAUNA VANNA LAI BADDHAI CHA 
HUNGER MA JAPDAI  XU MANTAR YHA DHERI XA ANTAR 
TIMRO JAWANI DEKHE RA LAAGDAI CHA 
CHAKKR

MA MAYA KO ROGI 
TIMI BANDAUNA 
DOCTOR AHH
 MAYA KO LAGI KATI 
KHADAI CHU THAKKR

HALKA BADY KO JEEUDAL 
MAH  MAKHHA TIMI SIMPLE NAI 
RAMRI NA PARANA NAKAL 

HOOK *
TIMRO LOOKS ATII BANGER
MERO HOOK TIMI SAMPLE 
TIMRO LOOKS ATII BANGER 
ATOM BOOM VANDA DANGER
                  X2

KBABI - verse 
NAHANA KTA GUFF MATHI GUFF 
DHERAI AATE GAYE TIMI JASTO CHAKS
RAYAAK LAGI RACHA PACHI PACHI
NAPARANA HASSssвҖҰ..

Rinmorin - YOU KNOW WHAT I MEAN !!!

FASDINA MAH JHAL MAH
NAGARANA AASH 
JAY HO TYI VANDINXU MALAI LAGDAINA K LAAJ
MALAI MAAN PARDAINA BOKA HARU 
VANU PARDA KHASS
SAMALYRA RAKHA TIMRO JAWANI KO MAAT

K VAKO KTA HARU KT DEKHI MARNY
JHYAP CHA SIDE MAH CHICKS KO PAXI PARNY KT DEKHNAI HUNNA 
MASKY RA KURA GARNY 
K BOLIDI HALYO VANY FERI
MASKI NAJIK SARNY 

GARO GARO VAKO HOLA 
JAWANI DEKHYRA
CHITTA BUJAU ABO KTA 
TADHAI BATA HERYRA
TIMI JASTO GAFADI YHA KTA HARU
DHERAI CHA THMANAI NASAKNY TESTO KURA MA MAH K RAICHA 

Rinmorin - OH shit !!

KBABI - MAYA KO ROGI VAYE JAAU GARAU CHECK UP 
TIMRO POCKET MONEY LAY AAUDAINA MERO MAKE-UP
SOCHDAI SOCHDINA MA MERO MIND PURAI SETUP 
KBABI TESTO KTA GARDAINA NI DESERVE 

PATAUNA KHOJYA HOLA
PATINY MAH CHAINA
GUFADI KO TRUST UMMM HMM
TESTO KT HOINA
KTA HARKO BANI SABI YESTI TA HO NI 
AAFNO KAAM GARA PACHI NALAGANA
SORRY BROвҖҰ.

HOOK *
TIMRO LOOKS ATII BANGER
MERO HOOK TIMI SAMPLE 
TIMRO LOOKS ATII BANGER 
ATOM BOOM VANDA DANGER  
                  X2

snippet.title: Navjot Ahuja - Khat (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
Navjot Ahuja - Khat 
Stream/Download:

~ MUSIC INFO ~ 
Recorded by Solo, Jay
Mixed, Mastered by Mukul Jain (Ferris Wheel Studios)
Instagram - @ferriswheelstudios
Composition, Lyrics, Vocals - Navjot Ahuja 
Drums - Samarth Verma 
Guitars - Mehul Sharma 
Keys - Kanishk Diwakar
Bass Guitars- Himanshu

 ~Lyrics ~ Navjot Ahuja - Khat
Kaagaz ke phool laau tere liye
Khat likhu tere liye
Mai khuda me maanu nahi
Par maangu dua tere liye

Tere liye ghar banaau
Deewaarein neele rang se sajaau
Pasand hai tumhe, maloom hai
Tumne bataya tha ekвҒҹdafe

NeeleвҒҹphoolвҒҹlaau tere liye
KhatвҒҹlikhu tere liye
MaiвҒҹkhuda me maanu nahi
Par maangu dua tere liye

Teri baatein nasamajh si phir bhi jaayaz lag rahi hai
Tu pareshan kar rahi hai phir bhi masoom lag rahi hai
Tere liye mandir jaaun
Tere naam ka dia jalaaun
Hasta rahe tu chaahe jo ho
TРөri hasi ko nazar na lage

Kaagaz ke phool laau terРө liye
Khat likhu tere liye
Mai khuda me maanu nahi
Par maangu dua tere liyeвҖҰ

Tere liye hum bane hai
Tere liye badal rahe hai
Kya mohabbat ho gayi hai
Teri hi teri baatein kare
Tere liye ghar banaau
Deewaarein neele rang se sajaau
Pasand hai tumhe, maloom hai
Tumne bataya tha ek dafe

Dekh shayar bana tere liye
Nagma likha tere liye
Mai khuda me maanu kyun
Tu khuda mere liye

snippet.title: Maan Panu - The Last Letter (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
вҖҳThe Last LetterвҖҷ is about the words we never said, and the love that never really leaves. This is for anyone who has ever held on to that one last feelingвҖҰ that one last memoryвҖҰ that one last letter.

STREAM NOW: https://va.lnk.to/thelastletter

Song Name: The Last Letter
Artist: Maan Panu
Lyrics: Maan Panu
Music Producer: Mazaak
Composed by: Maan Panu
Recording Engineer: Samir Dharap at Input One
Mixed & Mastered by: Hanish Taneja at Studio Alika

Video Credits:

snippet.title: Uniq Poet - Overdue ft. MC Flo
snippet.description:
Artists: Uniq Poet ft. MC Flo
Written by: Uniq Poet & MC Flo
Produced by: Mr. Yoshi (MPC Live 2 & Suno)
Co-Produced, Mixed & Mastered by: Kpass

About the Track
"Overdue" is a collaboration between Uniq Poet and MC Flo, blending lyricism with a soulful, melodic foundation. Produced on the MPC Live 2 with vocal enhancements via Suno, the track represents Uniq Poet and MC FloвҖҷs mindset as they traverse through a life where music is a constant battle between internal pressure and external expectation. It serves as a candid reflection on the feeling of having fallen short for the listeners, capturing the moment an artist faces their own perceived delays. MC Flo, a long-standing inspiration and peer on this shared path, enters with a verse that serves as a catalyst, injecting the "can-do" mentality needed to break the silence and pull the narrative back into the light.

вҖңEvery line I write is a dedication long overdue!вҖқ

Song Lyrisc :
аӨҹаӨҫаӨўаӨҫ аӨ—аӨҜаҘҢ аӨӨаӨҝаӨ®аҘҖ, аӨ®аӨІаӨҫаӨҲ аӨӣаҘӢаӨЎаҘҮаӨ°
 аӨ–аӨҫаӨҸаӨ•аӨҫ аӨ¬аӨҫаӨҡаӨҫ аӨ…аӨЁаӨҝ, аӨөаӨҝаӨ¶аҘҚаӨөаӨҫаӨёаӨІаӨҫаӨҲ аӨӨаҘӢаӨЎаҘҮаӨ°
аӨ¬аӨҝаӨЁаҘҚаӨӨаҘҖ аӨ—аӨ°аҘҚаӨӣаҘҒ аӨӨаӨҝаӨ®аҘҖаӨІаӨҫаӨҲ, аӨҰаҘҒаӨҲ аӨ№аӨҫаӨӨ аӨңаҘӢаӨЎаҘҮаӨ°
 аӨ«аӨ°аҘҚаӨ•аҘҖ аӨҶаӨҮаӨҰаҘҮаӨү аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨҝаӨҜ, аӨ¬аӨҫаӨҹаҘӢ аӨ®аҘӢаӨЎаҘҮаӨ° 

аӨҹаӨҫаӨўаҘҲ аӨӯаӨҸаӨӘаӨЁаӨҝ, аӨ®аӨЁаӨ•аҘӢ аӨ®аӨҫаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ®аӨ°аҘҚаӨҰаҘҲаӨЁ
 аӨ…аӨЁаҘҚаӨӨаҘҲ аӨ–аҘҒаӨёаҘҖ аӨӣаҘҢ аӨӯаӨЁаҘҮ, аӨ«аӨ°аҘҚаӨ•аҘҖ аӨҶаӨүаӨЁаҘҒ аӨӘаӨ°аҘҚаӨҰаҘҲаӨЁаҘӨ 

аӨЁаӨ«аӨ°аҘҚаӨ•аӨҝаӨЁаҘҮаӨ—аӨ°аҘҖ аӨ—аӨҜаҘҢ, аӨ®аҘҲаӨІаҘҮ аӨҡаӨҫаӨ№аҘҮаӨ°аӨЁаӨҝ аӨ°аҘӢаӨ•аҘҚаӨЁ аӨёаӨ•аӨҝаӨЁ,
 аӨҶаӨҒаӨёаҘҒаӨІаҘҮ аӨ•аҘӢаӨ°аҘҮаӨ•аҘӢ аӨ¶аӨ¬аҘҚаӨҰаӨ®аӨҫ, аӨӨаӨҝаӨ®аҘҖ аӨЁаҘҲ аӨӨаӨҝаӨ®аҘҖ аӨӣаҘҢ аӨ•аӨҝаӨЁ?

аӨ«аӨ°аҘҚаӨ•аҘҮаӨ° аӨҶаӨүаӨҒаӨӣаҘҢ аӨ•аӨҝ аӨӯаӨЁаҘҚаӨЁаҘҮ, аӨҶаӨ¶ аӨӘаӨЁаӨҝ аӨ®аӨ°аҘҮаӨ° аӨ—аӨҜаҘӢ
аӨ®аӨЁаӨҰаҘҮаӨ–аӨҝ аӨ®аӨҫаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ—аӨ°аҘҚаӨҰаӨҫ аӨӘаӨЁаӨҝ, аӨҶаӨң аӨ…аӨ§аҘҒаӨ°аҘӢ аӨӯаӨҜаҘӢ
 аӨ«аӨ°аҘҚаӨ•аҘҮаӨ° аӨҶаӨүаӨҒаӨӣаҘҢ аӨ•аӨҝ аӨӯаӨЁаҘҚаӨЁаҘҮ, аӨҶаӨ¶ аӨӘаӨЁаӨҝ аӨ®аӨ°аҘҮаӨ° аӨ—аӨҜаҘӢ
аӨ®аӨЁаӨҰаҘҮаӨ–аӨҝ аӨ®аӨҫаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ—аӨ°аҘҚаӨҰаӨҫ аӨӘаӨЁаӨҝ, аӨҶаӨң аӨ…аӨ§аҘҒаӨ°аҘӢ аӨӯаӨҜаҘӢвҖҰ

аӨӨаӨҝаӨ®аҘҚаӨ°аҘӢ аӨӨаӨёаҘҚаӨ¬аӨҝаӨ° аӨ№аҘҮаӨ°аҘҚаӨҰаҘҲ, аӨ°аӨҫаӨӨаӨӯаӨ°аӨҝ аӨ¬аҘӢаӨІаҘҚаӨӣаҘҒаҘӨ
 аӨ•аӨІаҘҚаӨӘаӨЁаӨҫаӨ®аҘҲ аӨӯаӨҸаӨӘаӨЁаӨҝ, аӨ®аӨЁаӨ•аҘӢ аӨ•аҘҒаӨ°аӨҫ аӨ–аҘӢаӨІаҘҚаӨӣаҘҒаҘӨ
 аӨёаӨ®аҘҚаӨқаӨЁаҘҚаӨӣаҘҒ аӨӨаҘҖ аӨҰаӨҝаӨЁаӨ№аӨ°аҘӮ,аӨңаӨ¬ аӨёаӨҫаӨҘаӨ®аӨҫ аӨӨаӨҝаӨ®аҘҖ аӨҘаӨҝаӨҜаҘҢ
 аӨ®аӨҫаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ®аӨҫаӨ—аҘҚаӨҰаӨҫ аӨ¬аӨҰаӨІаӨҫаӨ®аӨҫ, аӨ•аӨҝаӨЁ аӨ§аҘӢаӨ•аӨҫ аӨҰаӨҝаӨҜаҘҢ 

 аӨҘаӨҫаӨ№аӨҫ аӨӣ аӨӨаӨҝаӨ®аҘҖ аӨ…аӨ¬, аӨ«аӨ°аҘҚаӨ•аҘҮаӨ° аӨҶаӨүаӨҒаӨҰаҘҲаӨЁ
 аӨ®аҘҲаӨІаҘҮ аӨңаӨӨаӨҝ аӨҶаӨҒаӨёаҘҒ аӨ¬аӨ—аӨҫаӨҸаӨЁаӨҝ, аӨӨаӨҝаӨ®аҘҖаӨІаӨҫаӨҲ аӨӘаӨҫаӨүаӨҒаӨҰаҘҲаӨЁаҘӨ 

аӨ«аӨ°аҘҚаӨ•аҘҮаӨ° аӨҶаӨүаӨҒаӨӣаҘҢ аӨ•аӨҝ аӨӯаӨЁаҘҚаӨЁаҘҮ, аӨҶаӨ¶ аӨӘаӨЁаӨҝ аӨ®аӨ°аҘҮаӨ° аӨ—аӨҜаҘӢ
аӨ®аӨЁаӨҰаҘҮаӨ–аӨҝ аӨ®аӨҫаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ—аӨ°аҘҚаӨҰаӨҫ аӨӘаӨЁаӨҝ, аӨҶаӨң аӨ…аӨ§аҘҒаӨ°аҘӢ аӨӯаӨҜаҘӢ
 аӨ«аӨ°аҘҚаӨ•аҘҮаӨ° аӨҶаӨүаӨҒаӨӣаҘҢ аӨ•аӨҝ аӨӯаӨЁаҘҚаӨЁаҘҮ, аӨҶаӨ¶ аӨӘаӨЁаӨҝ аӨ®аӨ°аҘҮаӨ° аӨ—аӨҜаҘӢ
аӨ®аӨЁаӨҰаҘҮаӨ–аӨҝ аӨ®аӨҫаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ—аӨ°аҘҚаӨҰаӨҫ аӨӘаӨЁаӨҝ, аӨҶаӨң аӨ…аӨ§аҘҒаӨ°аҘӢ аӨӯаӨҜаҘӢвҖҰ

аӨ–аҘҒаӨёаҘҖ аӨ№аҘҒаӨЁаҘҒ аӨңаҘӢаӨёаӨҒаӨ— аӨӣаҘҢ, аӨӨаӨҝаӨ®аҘҚаӨ°аҘӢ аӨ¬аӨҫаӨҹаҘӢ аӨӣаҘҮаӨ•аҘҚаӨҰаӨҝаӨЁ
аӨҹаӨҫаӨўаҘҲ аӨңаӨҫаӨЁаҘҒ аӨ®аӨҰаҘҮаӨ–аӨҝ ,аӨ…аӨ¬ аӨӨаӨҝаӨ®аҘҖаӨІаӨҫаӨҲ аӨ°аҘӢаӨ•аҘҚаӨҰаӨҝаӨЁ
 аӨ¬аӨҝаӨ°аҘҚаӨёаӨҝаӨҸаӨ°аҘҲ аӨңаӨҫаӨү аӨ®аӨІаӨҫаӨҲ, аӨёаӨ®аҘҚаӨқаӨЁаӨҫаӨ®аӨҫ аӨЁаӨҶаӨ“аӨёаҘҚ
аӨ®аҘҲаӨІаҘҮ аӨӘаӨҫаӨҸаӨңаӨёаҘҚаӨӨаҘӢ аӨ§аҘӢаӨ•аӨҫ, аӨӨаӨҝаӨ®аҘҖаӨІаҘҮ аӨЁаӨӘаӨҫаӨ“аӨёаҘҚ 

 аӨ…аӨ°аҘҚаӨ•аҘӢ аӨңаӨЁаҘҚаӨ® аӨ№аҘҒаӨЁаҘҚаӨӣ аӨӯаӨЁаҘҮ, аӨӯаҘҮаӨҹаҘҚаӨЁаҘҒ аӨӣаҘҲаӨЁ аӨӨаӨҝаӨ®аҘҖаӨІаӨҫаӨҲ,
 аӨ¬аӨҰаӨІаӨҫ аӨІаӨҝаӨЁ аӨҶаӨ«аҘҚаӨЁаҘҲ аӨ®аҘҒаӨҹаҘҒ, аӨ°аҘҮаӨҹаҘҚаӨЁаҘҒ аӨӣаҘҲаӨЁ аӨӨаӨҝаӨ®аҘҖаӨІаӨҫаӨҲ
аӨ«аӨҫаӨҹаҘҮаӨ•аҘӢ аӨ®аӨЁ аӨ…аӨ¬, аӨҜаӨҫаӨҰаӨ•аҘӢ аӨёаӨҝаӨҜаҘӢаӨІаҘҮ аӨёаӨҝаӨүаӨҒаӨҰаӨӣаҘҒаҘӨ
аӨҜаҘӢ аӨңаҘҒаӨЁаҘҖ аӨӨ аӨ•аҘҮаӨөаӨІ, аӨӨаӨҝаӨ®аҘҚаӨ°аҘҲ аӨЁаӨҫаӨ®аӨ®аӨҫ аӨңаӨҝаӨүаӨҒаӨҰаӨӣаҘҒаҘӨ 

аӨ¬аӨҫаӨҒаӨҡаҘҚаӨЁаҘҒ аӨӣаҘҲаӨЁ аӨ…аӨ¬ аӨ®аӨІаӨҫаӨҲ аӨ®аҘҒаӨҹаҘҒ аӨҰаҘҒаӨ–аӨҫаӨҸаӨ°
аӨ—аӨҫаӨ№аҘҚаӨ°аҘӢ аӨӯаҘӢ аӨ№аӨҫаӨҒаӨёаҘҚаӨЁ аӨ…аӨ¬ аӨҶаӨҒаӨёаҘҒ аӨІаҘҒаӨ•аӨҫаӨҸаӨ°

аӨ«аӨ°аҘҚаӨ•аҘҮаӨ° аӨҶаӨүаӨҒаӨӣаҘҢ аӨ•аӨҝ аӨӯаӨЁаҘҚаӨЁаҘҮ, аӨҶаӨ¶ аӨӘаӨЁаӨҝ аӨ®аӨ°аҘҮаӨ° аӨ—аӨҜаҘӢ

 аӨ«аӨ°аҘҚаӨ•аҘҮаӨ° аӨҶаӨүаӨҒаӨӣаҘҢ аӨ•аӨҝ аӨӯаӨЁаҘҚаӨЁаҘҮ, аӨҶаӨ¶ аӨӘаӨЁаӨҝ аӨ®аӨ°аҘҮаӨ° аӨ—аӨҜаҘӢ

аӨ¬аӨҝаӨЁаҘҚаӨӨаҘҖ аӨ—аӨ°аҘҚаӨӣаҘҒ аӨӨаӨҝаӨ®аҘҖаӨІаӨҫаӨҲ, аӨҰаҘҒаӨҲ аӨ№аӨҫаӨӨ аӨңаҘӢаӨЎаҘҮаӨ°
 аӨ«аӨ°аҘҚаӨ•аҘҖ аӨҶаӨҮаӨҰаҘҮаӨү аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨҝаӨҜ, аӨ¬аӨҫаӨҹаҘӢ аӨ®аҘӢаӨЎаҘҮаӨ° 

аӨҹаӨҫаӨўаҘҲ аӨӯаӨҸаӨӘаӨЁаӨҝ, аӨ®аӨЁаӨ•аҘӢ аӨ®аӨҫаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ®аӨ°аҘҚаӨҰаҘҲаӨЁ
 аӨ…аӨЁаҘҚаӨӨаҘҲ аӨ–аҘҒаӨёаҘҖ аӨӣаҘҢ аӨӯаӨЁаҘҮ, аӨ«аӨ°аҘҚаӨ•аҘҖ аӨҶаӨүаӨЁаҘҒ аӨӘаӨ°аҘҚаӨҰаҘҲаӨЁаҘӨ 

аӨЁаӨ«аӨ°аҘҚаӨ•аӨҝаӨЁаҘҮаӨ—аӨ°аҘҖ аӨ—аӨҜаҘҢ, аӨ®аҘҲаӨІаҘҮ аӨҡаӨҫаӨ№аҘҮаӨ°аӨЁаӨҝ аӨ°аҘӢаӨ•аҘҚаӨЁ аӨёаӨ•аӨҝаӨЁ,
 аӨҶаӨҒаӨёаҘҒаӨІаҘҮ аӨ•аҘӢаӨ°аҘҮаӨ•аҘӢ аӨ¶аӨ¬аҘҚаӨҰаӨ®аӨҫ, аӨӨаӨҝаӨ®аҘҖ аӨЁаҘҲ аӨӨаӨҝаӨ®аҘҖ аӨӣаҘҢ аӨ•аӨҝаӨЁ?

аӨ«аӨ°аҘҚаӨ•аҘҮаӨ° аӨҶаӨүаӨҒаӨӣаҘҢ аӨ•аӨҝ аӨӯаӨЁаҘҚаӨЁаҘҮ, аӨҶаӨ¶ аӨӘаӨЁаӨҝ аӨ®аӨ°аҘҮаӨ° аӨ—аӨҜаҘӢ
аӨ®аӨЁаӨҰаҘҮаӨ–аӨҝ аӨ®аӨҫаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ—аӨ°аҘҚаӨҰаӨҫ аӨӘаӨЁаӨҝ, аӨҶаӨң аӨ…аӨ§аҘҒаӨ°аҘӢ аӨӯаӨҜаҘӢ
 аӨ«аӨ°аҘҚаӨ•аҘҮаӨ° аӨҶаӨүаӨҒаӨӣаҘҢ аӨ•аӨҝ аӨӯаӨЁаҘҚаӨЁаҘҮ, аӨҶаӨ¶ аӨӘаӨЁаӨҝ аӨ®аӨ°аҘҮаӨ° аӨ—аӨҜаҘӢ
аӨ®аӨЁаӨҰаҘҮаӨ–аӨҝ аӨ®аӨҫаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ—аӨ°аҘҚаӨҰаӨҫ аӨӘаӨЁаӨҝ, аӨҶаӨң аӨ…аӨ§аҘҒаӨ°аҘӢ аӨӯаӨҜаҘӢвҖҰ

аӨӨаӨҝаӨ®аҘҚаӨ°аҘӢ аӨӨаӨёаҘҚаӨ¬аӨҝаӨ° аӨ№аҘҮаӨ°аҘҚаӨҰаҘҲ, аӨ°аӨҫаӨӨаӨӯаӨ°аӨҝ аӨ¬аҘӢаӨІаҘҚаӨӣаҘҒаҘӨ
 аӨ•аӨІаҘҚаӨӘаӨЁаӨҫаӨ®аҘҲ аӨӯаӨҸаӨӘаӨЁаӨҝ, аӨ®аӨЁаӨ•аҘӢ аӨ•аҘҒаӨ°аӨҫ аӨ–аҘӢаӨІаҘҚаӨӣаҘҒаҘӨ
 аӨёаӨ®аҘҚаӨқаӨЁаҘҚаӨӣаҘҒ аӨӨаҘҖ аӨҰаӨҝаӨЁаӨ№аӨ°аҘӮ,аӨңаӨ¬ аӨёаӨҫаӨҘаӨ®аӨҫ аӨӨаӨҝаӨ®аҘҖ аӨҘаӨҝаӨҜаҘҢ
 аӨ®аӨҫаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ®аӨҫаӨ—аҘҚаӨҰаӨҫ аӨ¬аӨҰаӨІаӨҫаӨ®аӨҫ, аӨ•аӨҝаӨЁ аӨ§аҘӢаӨ•аӨҫ аӨҰаӨҝаӨҜаҘҢ 

 аӨҘаӨҫаӨ№аӨҫ аӨӣ аӨӨаӨҝаӨ®аҘҖ аӨ…аӨ¬, аӨ«аӨ°аҘҚаӨ•аҘҮаӨ° аӨҶаӨүаӨҒаӨҰаҘҲаӨЁ
 аӨ®аҘҲаӨІаҘҮ аӨңаӨӨаӨҝ аӨҶаӨҒаӨёаҘҒ аӨ¬аӨ—аӨҫаӨҸаӨЁаӨҝ, аӨӨаӨҝаӨ®аҘҖаӨІаӨҫаӨҲ аӨӘаӨҫаӨүаӨҒаӨҰаҘҲаӨЁаҘӨ 

аӨ«аӨ°аҘҚаӨ•аҘҮаӨ° аӨҶаӨүаӨҒаӨӣаҘҢ аӨ•аӨҝ аӨӯаӨЁаҘҚаӨЁаҘҮ, аӨҶаӨ¶ аӨӘаӨЁаӨҝ аӨ®аӨ°аҘҮаӨ° аӨ—аӨҜаҘӢ
аӨ®аӨЁаӨҰаҘҮаӨ–аӨҝ аӨ®аӨҫаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ—аӨ°аҘҚаӨҰаӨҫ аӨӘаӨЁаӨҝ, аӨҶаӨң аӨ…аӨ§аҘҒаӨ°аҘӢ аӨӯаӨҜаҘӢ
 аӨ«аӨ°аҘҚаӨ•аҘҮаӨ° аӨҶаӨүаӨҒаӨӣаҘҢ аӨ•аӨҝ аӨӯаӨЁаҘҚаӨЁаҘҮ, аӨҶаӨ¶ аӨӘаӨЁаӨҝ аӨ®аӨ°аҘҮаӨ° аӨ—аӨҜаҘӢ
аӨ®аӨЁаӨҰаҘҮаӨ–аӨҝ аӨ®аӨҫаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ—аӨ°аҘҚаӨҰаӨҫ аӨӘаӨЁаӨҝ, аӨҶаӨң аӨ…аӨ§аҘҒаӨ°аҘӢ аӨӯаӨҜаҘӢвҖҰ

аӨ–аҘҒаӨёаҘҖ аӨ№аҘҒаӨЁаҘҒ аӨңаҘӢаӨёаӨҒаӨ— аӨӣаҘҢ, аӨӨаӨҝаӨ®аҘҚаӨ°аҘӢ аӨ¬аӨҫаӨҹаҘӢ аӨӣаҘҮаӨ•аҘҚаӨҰаӨҝаӨЁ
аӨҹаӨҫаӨўаҘҲ аӨңаӨҫаӨЁаҘҒ аӨ®аӨҰаҘҮаӨ–аӨҝ ,аӨ…аӨ¬ аӨӨаӨҝаӨ®аҘҖаӨІаӨҫаӨҲ аӨ°аҘӢаӨ•аҘҚаӨҰаӨҝаӨЁ
 аӨ¬аӨҝаӨ°аҘҚаӨёаӨҝаӨҸаӨ°аҘҲ аӨңаӨҫаӨү аӨ®аӨІаӨҫаӨҲ, аӨёаӨ®аҘҚаӨқаӨЁаӨҫаӨ®аӨҫ аӨЁаӨҶаӨ“аӨёаҘҚ
аӨ®аҘҲаӨІаҘҮ аӨӘаӨҫаӨҸаӨңаӨёаҘҚаӨӨаҘӢ аӨ§аҘӢаӨ•аӨҫ, аӨӨаӨҝаӨ®аҘҖаӨІаҘҮ аӨЁаӨӘаӨҫаӨ“аӨёаҘҚ 

 аӨ…аӨ°аҘҚаӨ•аҘӢ аӨңаӨЁаҘҚаӨ® аӨ№аҘҒаӨЁаҘҚаӨӣ аӨӯаӨЁаҘҮ, аӨӯаҘҮаӨҹаҘҚаӨЁаҘҒ аӨӣаҘҲаӨЁ аӨӨаӨҝаӨ®аҘҖаӨІаӨҫаӨҲ,
 аӨ¬аӨҰаӨІаӨҫ аӨІаӨҝаӨЁ аӨҶаӨ«аҘҚаӨЁаҘҲ аӨ®аҘҒаӨҹаҘҒ, аӨ°аҘҮаӨҹаҘҚаӨЁаҘҒ аӨӣаҘҲаӨЁ аӨӨаӨҝаӨ®аҘҖаӨІаӨҫаӨҲ
аӨ«аӨҫаӨҹаҘҮаӨ•аҘӢ аӨ®аӨЁ аӨ…аӨ¬, аӨҜаӨҫаӨҰаӨ•аҘӢ аӨёаӨҝаӨҜаҘӢаӨІаҘҮ аӨёаӨҝаӨүаӨҒаӨҰаӨӣаҘҒаҘӨ
аӨҜаҘӢ аӨңаҘҒаӨЁаҘҖ аӨӨ аӨ•аҘҮаӨөаӨІ, аӨӨаӨҝаӨ®аҘҚаӨ°аҘҲ аӨЁаӨҫаӨ®аӨ®аӨҫ аӨңаӨҝаӨүаӨҒаӨҰаӨӣаҘҒаҘӨ 

аӨ¬аӨҫаӨҒаӨҡаҘҚаӨЁаҘҒ аӨӣаҘҲаӨЁ аӨ…аӨ¬ аӨ®аӨІаӨҫаӨҲ аӨ®аҘҒаӨҹаҘҒ аӨҰаҘҒаӨ–аӨҫаӨҸаӨ°
аӨ—аӨҫаӨ№аҘҚаӨ°аҘӢ аӨӯаҘӢ аӨ№аӨҫаӨҒаӨёаҘҚаӨЁ аӨ…аӨ¬ аӨҶаӨҒаӨёаҘҒ аӨІаҘҒаӨ•аӨҫаӨҸаӨ°

аӨ«аӨ°аҘҚаӨ•аҘҮаӨ° аӨҶаӨүаӨҒаӨӣаҘҢ аӨ•аӨҝ аӨӯаӨЁаҘҚаӨЁаҘҮ, аӨҶаӨ¶ аӨӘаӨЁаӨҝ аӨ®аӨ°аҘҮаӨ° аӨ—аӨҜаҘӢ
аӨ®аӨЁаӨҰаҘҮаӨ–аӨҝ аӨ®аӨҫаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ—аӨ°аҘҚаӨҰаӨҫ аӨӘаӨЁаӨҝ, аӨҶаӨң аӨ…аӨ§аҘҒаӨ°аҘӢ аӨӯаӨҜаҘӢ
 аӨ«аӨ°аҘҚаӨ•аҘҮаӨ° аӨҶаӨүаӨҒаӨӣаҘҢ аӨ•аӨҝ аӨӯаӨЁаҘҚаӨЁаҘҮ, аӨҶаӨ¶ аӨӘаӨЁаӨҝ аӨ®аӨ°аҘҮаӨ° аӨ—аӨҜаҘӢ

аӨ®аӨЁаӨҰаҘҮаӨ–аӨҝ аӨ®аӨҫаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ—аӨ°аҘҚаӨҰаӨҫ аӨӘаӨЁаӨҝ, аӨҶаӨң аӨ…аӨ§аҘҒаӨ°аҘӢ аӨӯаӨҜаҘӢ
 аӨ«аӨ°аҘҚаӨ•аҘҮаӨ° аӨҶаӨүаӨҒаӨӣаҘҢ аӨ•аӨҝ аӨӯаӨЁаҘҚаӨЁаҘҮ, аӨҶаӨ¶ аӨӘаӨЁаӨҝ аӨ®аӨ°аҘҮаӨ° аӨ—аӨҜаҘӢ
аӨ®аӨЁаӨҰаҘҮаӨ–аӨҝ аӨ®аӨҫаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ—аӨ°аҘҚаӨҰаӨҫ аӨӘаӨЁаӨҝ, аӨҶаӨң аӨ…аӨ§аҘҒаӨ°аҘӢ аӨӯаӨҜаҘӢвҖҰ

аӨӨаӨҝаӨ®аҘҚаӨ°аҘӢ аӨӨаӨёаҘҚаӨ¬аӨҝаӨ° аӨ№аҘҮаӨ°аҘҚаӨҰаҘҲ, аӨ°аӨҫаӨӨаӨӯаӨ°аӨҝ аӨ¬аҘӢаӨІаҘҚаӨӣаҘҒаҘӨ
 аӨ•аӨІаҘҚаӨӘаӨЁаӨҫаӨ®аҘҲ аӨӯаӨҸаӨӘаӨЁаӨҝ, аӨ®аӨЁаӨ•аҘӢ аӨ•аҘҒаӨ°аӨҫ аӨ–аҘӢаӨІаҘҚаӨӣаҘҒаҘӨ
 аӨёаӨ®аҘҚаӨқаӨЁаҘҚаӨӣаҘҒ аӨӨаҘҖ аӨҰаӨҝаӨЁаӨ№аӨ°аҘӮ,аӨңаӨ¬ аӨёаӨҫаӨҘаӨ®аӨҫ аӨӨаӨҝаӨ®аҘҖ аӨҘаӨҝаӨҜаҘҢ
 аӨ®аӨҫаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ®аӨҫаӨ—аҘҚаӨҰаӨҫ аӨ¬аӨҰаӨІаӨҫаӨ®аӨҫ, аӨ•аӨҝаӨЁ аӨ§аҘӢаӨ•аӨҫ аӨҰаӨҝаӨҜаҘҢ 

 аӨҘаӨҫаӨ№аӨҫ аӨӣ аӨӨаӨҝаӨ®аҘҖ аӨ…аӨ¬, аӨ«аӨ°аҘҚаӨ•аҘҮаӨ° аӨҶаӨүаӨҒаӨҰаҘҲаӨЁ
 аӨ®аҘҲаӨІаҘҮ аӨңаӨӨаӨҝ аӨҶаӨҒаӨёаҘҒ аӨ¬аӨ—аӨҫаӨҸаӨЁаӨҝ, аӨӨаӨҝаӨ®аҘҖаӨІаӨҫаӨҲ аӨӘаӨҫаӨүаӨҒаӨҰаҘҲаӨЁаҘӨ 

аӨ«аӨ°аҘҚаӨ•аҘҮаӨ° аӨҶаӨүаӨҒаӨӣаҘҢ аӨ•аӨҝ аӨӯаӨЁаҘҚаӨЁаҘҮ, аӨҶаӨ¶ аӨӘаӨЁаӨҝ аӨ®аӨ°аҘҮаӨ° аӨ—аӨҜаҘӢ
аӨ®аӨЁаӨҰаҘҮаӨ–аӨҝ аӨ®аӨҫаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ—аӨ°аҘҚаӨҰаӨҫ аӨӘаӨЁаӨҝ, аӨҶаӨң аӨ…аӨ§аҘҒаӨ°аҘӢ аӨӯаӨҜаҘӢ
 аӨ«аӨ°аҘҚаӨ•аҘҮаӨ° аӨҶаӨүаӨҒаӨӣаҘҢ аӨ•аӨҝ аӨӯаӨЁаҘҚаӨЁаҘҮ, аӨҶаӨ¶ аӨӘаӨЁаӨҝ аӨ®аӨ°аҘҮаӨ° аӨ—аӨҜаҘӢ
аӨ®аӨЁаӨҰаҘҮаӨ–аӨҝ аӨ®аӨҫаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ—аӨ°аҘҚаӨҰаӨҫ аӨӘаӨЁаӨҝ, аӨҶаӨң аӨ…аӨ§аҘҒаӨ°аҘӢ аӨӯаӨҜаҘӢвҖҰ

аӨ–аҘҒаӨёаҘҖ аӨ№аҘҒаӨЁаҘҒ аӨңаҘӢаӨёаӨҒаӨ— аӨӣаҘҢ, аӨӨаӨҝаӨ®аҘҚаӨ°аҘӢ аӨ¬аӨҫаӨҹаҘӢ аӨӣаҘҮаӨ•аҘҚаӨҰаӨҝаӨЁ
аӨҹаӨҫаӨўаҘҲ аӨңаӨҫаӨЁаҘҒ аӨ®аӨҰаҘҮаӨ–аӨҝ ,аӨ…аӨ¬ аӨӨаӨҝаӨ®аҘҖаӨІаӨҫаӨҲ аӨ°аҘӢаӨ•аҘҚаӨҰаӨҝаӨЁ
 аӨ¬аӨҝаӨ°аҘҚаӨёаӨҝаӨҸаӨ°аҘҲ аӨңаӨҫаӨү аӨ®аӨІаӨҫаӨҲ, аӨёаӨ®аҘҚаӨқаӨЁаӨҫаӨ®аӨҫ аӨЁаӨҶаӨ“аӨёаҘҚ
аӨ®аҘҲаӨІаҘҮ аӨӘаӨҫаӨҸаӨңаӨёаҘҚаӨӨаҘӢ аӨ§аҘӢаӨ•аӨҫ, аӨӨаӨҝаӨ®аҘҖаӨІаҘҮ аӨЁаӨӘаӨҫаӨ“аӨёаҘҚ 

 аӨ…аӨ°аҘҚаӨ•аҘӢ аӨңаӨЁаҘҚаӨ® аӨ№аҘҒаӨЁаҘҚаӨӣ аӨӯаӨЁаҘҮ, аӨӯаҘҮаӨҹаҘҚаӨЁаҘҒ аӨӣаҘҲаӨЁ аӨӨаӨҝаӨ®аҘҖаӨІаӨҫаӨҲ,
 аӨ¬аӨҰаӨІаӨҫ аӨІаӨҝаӨЁ аӨҶаӨ«аҘҚаӨЁаҘҲ аӨ®аҘҒаӨҹаҘҒ, аӨ°аҘҮаӨҹаҘҚаӨЁаҘҒ аӨӣаҘҲаӨЁ аӨӨаӨҝаӨ®аҘҖаӨІаӨҫаӨҲ
аӨ«аӨҫаӨҹаҘҮаӨ•аҘӢ аӨ®аӨЁ аӨ…аӨ¬, аӨҜаӨҫаӨҰаӨ•аҘӢ аӨёаӨҝаӨҜаҘӢаӨІаҘҮ аӨёаӨҝаӨүаӨҒаӨҰаӨӣаҘҒаҘӨ
аӨҜаҘӢ аӨңаҘҒаӨЁаҘҖ аӨӨ аӨ•аҘҮаӨөаӨІ, аӨӨаӨҝаӨ®аҘҚаӨ°аҘҲ аӨЁаӨҫаӨ®аӨ®аӨҫ аӨңаӨҝаӨүаӨҒаӨҰаӨӣаҘҒаҘӨ 

аӨ¬аӨҫаӨҒаӨҡаҘҚаӨЁаҘҒ аӨӣаҘҲаӨЁ аӨ…аӨ¬ аӨ®аӨІаӨҫаӨҲ аӨ®аҘҒаӨҹаҘҒ аӨҰаҘҒаӨ–аӨҫаӨҸаӨ°
аӨ—аӨҫаӨ№аҘҚаӨ°аҘӢ аӨӯаҘӢ аӨ№аӨҫаӨҒаӨёаҘҚаӨЁ аӨ…аӨ¬ аӨҶаӨҒаӨёаҘҒ аӨІаҘҒаӨ•аӨҫаӨҸаӨ°

аӨ«аӨ°аҘҚаӨ•аҘҮаӨ° аӨҶаӨүаӨҒаӨӣаҘҢ аӨ•аӨҝ аӨӯаӨЁаҘҚаӨЁаҘҮ, аӨҶаӨ¶ аӨӘаӨЁаӨҝ аӨ®аӨ°аҘҮаӨ° аӨ—аӨҜаҘӢ
аӨ®аӨЁаӨҰаҘҮаӨ–аӨҝ аӨ®аӨҫаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ—аӨ°аҘҚаӨҰаӨҫ аӨӘаӨЁаӨҝ, аӨҶаӨң аӨ…аӨ§аҘҒаӨ°аҘӢ аӨӯаӨҜаҘӢ
 аӨ«аӨ°аҘҚаӨ•аҘҮаӨ° аӨҶаӨүаӨҒаӨӣаҘҢ аӨ•аӨҝ аӨӯаӨЁаҘҚаӨЁаҘҮ, аӨҶаӨ¶ аӨӘаӨЁаӨҝ аӨ®аӨ°аҘҮаӨ° аӨ—аӨҜаҘӢ
аӨ®аӨЁаӨҰаҘҮаӨ–аӨҝ аӨ®аӨҫаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ—аӨ°аҘҚаӨҰаӨҫ аӨӘаӨЁаӨҝ, аӨҶаӨң аӨ…аӨ§аҘҒаӨ°аҘӢ аӨӯаӨҜаҘӢвҖҰ

Tadha gayau timi, malai chhoder
Khayeka bacha ani, bishwaslai toder
Binti garchhu timilai, dui haat joder
Farki aideu priya, bato moder

Tadhai bhaepani, manko maya mardaina
Antai khusi chhau bhane, Farki aaunu pardaina

Nafarkine gari gayau, maile chahera ni rokna sakin
Aansule koreko shabdama, timi nai timi chhau kina?

Farkera aauchhau ki bhanne, aasha pani marera gayo
Mandekhi maya garda pani, aaja adhuro bhayo
Farkera aauchhau ki bhanne, aasha pani marera gayo
Mandekhi maya garda pani, aaja adhuro bhayoвҖҰ

Timro tasbir herdai, raatbhari bolchhu
Kalpanamai bhaepani, manko kura kholchhu
Samjhinchhu ti dinharu, jaba saathma timi thiyau
Maya magda badlama, kina dhoka diyau

Thaha chha timi aba, Farkera aaudaina
Maile jati aansu bagaeni, timilai paaudaina

Farkera aauchhau ki bhanne, aasha pani marera gayo
Mandekhi maya garda pani, aaja adhuro bhayo
Farkera aauchhau ki bhanne, aasha pani marera gayo
Mandekhi maya garda pani, aaja adhuro bhayoвҖҰ

Khusi hunu josanga chhau, timro bato chhekdina
Tadhai janu madekhi, aba timilai rokdina
Birsiera jau malai, samjhanama naaos
Maile paae jasto dhoka, timile napaos

Arko janma hunchha bhane, bhetna chhaina timilai
Badla lina aafnai mutu, retnu chhaina timilai
Fateko man aba, yaadko siyole siundchhu
Yo juni ta kebal, timrai naam ma jiundchhu

Bachnu chhaina aba malai mutu dukhaayera
Gahro bho haasna aba aansu lukaayera

snippet.title: Desh Ko Maya Feat. Arthur Gunn - Neetesh Jung Kunwar
snippet.description:
Desh Ko Maya Feat. Arthur Gunn (Dibesh Pokhrel) - Neetesh Jung Kunwar

Listen to Desh Ko Maya on Spotify-

https://open.spotify.com/track/64hU7x4kdmzpWLgfIEMqyb?si=A-iCIo8WTJmqZrx8Gl2OFw

Listen to Desh Ko Maya on Apple Music-

https://music.apple.com/np/album/desh-ko-maya-feat-arthur-gunn-single/1881699953

Lyrics

аӨҜаӨҫаӨҰ аӨҶаӨҸ аӨЎаӨҫаӨЎаӨҫ аӨ° аӨӘаӨҫаӨ–аӨҫ
аӨҸаӨ• аӨёаӨҫаӨӮаӨқаҘҲ аӨ®аӨЁ аӨӯаӨҫаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ№аҘҒаӨЁаҘҚаӨӣ
аӨ°аӨёаӨҫаӨҸаӨЁаӨҝ аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аӨҫ аӨҶаӨҒаӨ–аӨҫ
аӨңаӨ¬ аӨҰаҘҮаӨ¶аӨ•аҘӢ аӨ®аӨҫаӨҜаӨҫаӨІаҘҮ аӨӣаҘҒаӨЁаҘҚаӨӣ

аӨ№аҘҮаӨ°аҘҚаӨӣаҘҒ аӨ® аӨ аҘӮаӨІаӨ аҘӮаӨІаӨҫ аӨ®аӨ№аӨІ
аӨёаҘҖаӨ°аӨҫаӨЁаҘҖ аӨҸаӨүаӨҹаҘҲаӨІаҘҮ аӨӘаҘҒаӨ—аҘҚаӨӣ
аӨ®аӨЁаҘҲаӨӯаӨ°аӨҝ аӨҡаӨ№аӨІ-аӨӘаӨ№аӨІ
аӨңаӨ¬ аӨҰаҘҮаӨ¶аӨ•аҘӢ аӨ®аӨҫаӨҜаӨҫаӨІаҘҮ аӨӣаҘҒаӨЁаҘҚаӨӣ
аӨңаӨ¬ аӨҰаҘҮаӨ¶аӨ•аҘӢ аӨ®аӨҫаӨҜаӨҫаӨІаҘҮ аӨӣаҘҒаӨЁаҘҚаӨӣ


аӨҜаӨҫаӨҰ аӨҶаӨҸ аӨ–аҘӢаӨІаӨҫ аӨ° аӨЁаӨҰаҘҖ
аӨңаӨӨаӨҝ аӨҹаӨҫаӨўаӨҫ аӨҶаӨүаӨӣ аӨӨаҘҚаӨҜаӨӨаӨҝ аӨ¬аӨўаҘҖ
аӨңаӨЁаҘҚаӨ®аҘҮаӨ•аҘӢ аӨӯаҘӮаӨ®аӨҝ аӨҶаӨ«аҘҚаӨЁаҘӢ аӨ№аҘҒаӨЁаҘҚаӨӣ
аӨңаӨ¬ аӨҰаҘҮаӨ¶аӨ•аҘӢ аӨ®аӨҫаӨҜаӨҫаӨІаҘҮ аӨӣаҘҒаӨЁаҘҚаӨӣ
аӨңаӨ¬ аӨҰаҘҮаӨ¶аӨ•аҘӢ аӨ®аӨҫаӨҜаӨҫаӨІаҘҮ аӨӣаҘҒаӨЁаҘҚаӨӣ

аӨ§аҘҒаӨ®аҘҚаӨӣаҘҒ аӨ® аӨ аҘӮаӨІаӨҫ-аӨ аҘӮаӨІаӨҫ аӨёаӨ№аӨ°
аӨ°аӨ®аҘҚаӨӣаҘҒ аӨҰаҘҮаӨ¶ аӨөаӨҝаӨҰаҘҮаӨ¶аӨ®аӨҫ
аӨӨаӨ° аӨ®аҘҮаӨҹаӨҝаӨЁаҘҚаӨЁ аӨ•аӨ№аӨҝаӨІаҘҚаӨҜаҘҲ аӨҜаҘӢ аӨӨаӨҝаӨ°аҘҚаӨёаӨЁаӨҫ
аӨңаӨ¬ аӨҰаҘҮаӨ¶аӨ•аҘӢ аӨҜаӨҫаӨҰаӨІаҘҮ аӨӣаҘҒаӨЁаҘҚаӨӣ
аӨңаӨ¬ аӨҰаҘҮаӨ¶аӨ•аҘӢ аӨ®аӨҫаӨҜаӨҫаӨІаҘҮ аӨӣаҘҒаӨЁаҘҚаӨӣ

аӨҸаӨ• аӨёаӨҫаӨӮаӨқаҘҲ аӨ®аӨЁ аӨӯаӨҫаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ№аҘҒаӨЁаҘҚаӨӣ
аӨ°аӨёаӨҫаӨҸаӨЁаӨҝ аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аӨҫ аӨҶаӨҒаӨ–аӨҫ

аӨёаҘҖаӨ°аӨҫаӨЁаҘҖ аӨҸаӨүаӨҹаҘҲаӨІаҘҮ аӨӘаҘҒаӨ—аҘҚаӨӣ

аӨҜаӨҫаӨҰ аӨҶаӨҸ аӨ–аҘӢаӨІаӨҫ аӨ° аӨЁаӨҰаҘҖ
аӨңаӨӨаӨҝ аӨҹаӨҫаӨўаӨҫ аӨҶаӨүаӨӣ аӨӨаҘҚаӨҜаӨӨаӨҝ аӨ¬аӨўаҘҖ

аӨ•аӨ№аӨҫаӨҒ аӨ—аӨҸ аӨ№аҘӢаӨІаӨҫаӨЁаҘҚ аӨӨаӨҝ аӨҰаӨҝаӨЁ
аӨҶаӨң аӨёаӨ®аҘҚаӨқаҘҖ аӨ®аӨЁ аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аҘӢ аӨ°аҘҒаӨЁаҘҚаӨӣ

аӨңаӨ¬ аӨҰаҘҮаӨ¶аӨ•аҘӢ аӨ®аӨҫаӨҜаӨҫаӨІаҘҮ аӨӣаҘҒаӨЁаҘҚаӨӣ

snippet.title: Zaalima - Arijit Singh | Shah Rukh Khan | Raees | Harshdeep Kaur | ValentineвҖҷs Special Love Song
snippet.description:
рҹ‘үрҹҸ» SUBSCRIBE to Bollywood Chartbusters - https://bit.ly/3Y1MW0B

Song - Zaalima
Music - JAM8
Lyrics - Amitabh Bhattacharya
Singers - Arijit Singh and Harshdeep Kaur
Choreography - Bosco- Caesar

Written by - Rahul Dholakia, Harit Mehta, Ashish Vashi & Niraj Shukla
Director Of Photography - K.U Mohanan ISC
Produced By - Ritesh Sidhwani, Gauri Khan & Farhan Akhtar
Directed By - Rahul Dholakia

Sound Design:- Dj Phukan, Sunny M.R.
Programmers:- Sourav Roy, Dj Phukan, Sunny M.R., Rohan Chauhan, Arijit Singh
Mix & Master:- Shadab Rayeen @ Newedge
Assistant:- Abhishek Sortey
Shoot Mix:- Ashwin Kulkarni
Recording Engineers:- Ashwin Kulkarni, Himanshu Shirlekar, Aaroh Velankar, Kaushik Das
Vocal Conductor:- Akashdeep Sengupta, Kaushik Das, Tushar Joshi

Musicians:-
Drums:- Alan Hertz
Bass:- Ernest Tibbs
Duff:- Iqbal Azad
Harmonium:- Feroz Shaikh
Acoustic Guitars:- Pawan Rasaily and Arijit Singh
Electric Guitars:- Pawan Rasaily 

Lyrics:
Jo Teri Khatir Tadpe Pehle Se Hi
Kya Usey Tadpana O Zaalima, O Zaalima
Jo Tere Ishq Mein Behka Pehle Se Hi
Kya Usey Behkana O Zaalima, O Zaalima

Aankhen Marhaba, Baatein Marhaba
Main Sau Martaba Deewana Huaa
Mera Na Raha Jab Se Dil Mera
Tere Husn Ka Nishana Hua

Jiski Har Dhadkan Tu Ho
Aise Dil Ko Kya Dhadkana
O Zaalima, O Zaalima

Saanson Mein Teri Nazdeeqiyon Ka
Itrr Tu Ghol De, Ghol DeвҖҰ
Main Hi Kyun Ishq Zaahir Karun
Tu Bhi Kabhi Bol De, Bol DeвҖҰ

Leke Jaan Hi Jaayega Meri
Qaatil Har Tera Bahaana Hua
Tujhse Hi Shuru
Tujhpe Hi Khatam
Mere Pyaar Ka Fasaana Hua

Tu Shamma Hai Toh Yaad Rakhna
Main Bhi Hoon Parwaana
O Zaalima, O Zaalima..

Deedaar Tera Milne Ke Baad Hi
Chhoote Meri Angdaayi
Tu Hi Bata De Kyun Zaalima Main Kehlayi..

#RaeesSongs #ShahRukhKhanSongs #ArijitSinghSongs #valentinesday #romanticsong #zaalima

Main To Dekh Dekh Sheesha Sharmandi Fir Su

Teri Pasand Ke Suit Main Siman Laag Gi
Oh Din Dholi Mein Tu Le Gaya Meri Jaan Kadh Ke
Pyar Aale Gaane Main To Gaan Laag Gi

Tere Paida Mein Ye Paid Meri Jaan Laag Gi

Main To Dekh Dekh Sheesha Sharmandi Fir Su
Dekh Dekh Sheesha Sharmandi Fir Su
Main To Dekh Dekh Sheesha Sharmandi Fir Su

Aakhya Me Aankh Mane Ghali Jo Beran
Teri Jhuk Gayi Thi Aankh Sharma Ke Ne Beran
Gora Gora Chaam Tera Kaale Kaale Baal Tere
Dub Gaya Mai Billi Billi Aankhya Mein Bairan

Teri Hasi Ke Hasi Jama Zeher Chhori Re
Is Chhore Ke Dil Pe Dhave Keher Chhori Re
Kade Rolya Me Pair Bhi Na Tekya Manne
Tere Paache Paale Baithe Ghane Bair Chhori Re

Tu Fursat Te Ghadi I Think Meri Jaan
Honth Tere Lal Gaal Pink Meri Jaan
Paida Pe Paid Tu Mila Ke Chaliye
Teri Gel Deun Gaane Main Sync Meri Jaan

Aankhya Re Maarya Tane Teer Chore Re
Mere Dil Ne Yu Gaya Jama Cheer Chore Re
Ho Teri Dhan Daulat Pe Manne Kuchh Konya Lena
Manne Dil Ka Tu Laage Se Ameer Chhore Re

snippet.title: Yabesh Thapa - Muskuraye | Live From EDN Sanepa | GhaamChhaya Intimate
snippet.description:
Hi lovelies,
Back in December, we did a very intimate show вҖ” just a few people, a lot of emotion, and the music that means everything to us. We filmed the night, and this is me and the band performing Muskuraye live at GhaamChhaya Intimate.

WeвҖҷll be sharing more moments from that evening soon. Until then, stream the album 'GhaamChhaya' on all major platforms.
And happy ValentineвҖҷs Day ;)

Keys / Vocals вҖ” Yabesh Thapa
Female BV вҖ” Oshin Karki
Male BV / AC Guitar вҖ” John Tamang
Drums вҖ” Stifler
Bass вҖ” Av Kc
Electric Guitar вҖ” Roshan Lama
Sarangi вҖ” Kiran Maharjan
Flute вҖ” Shrijan Maharjan
Audio Engineer вҖ” Neerab Shrestha

Mixed / Master вҖ” Kobid Bazra

Special thanks to Ruslan Studio and Jade Studio for supporting us.

Stay connected:
https://www.instagram.com/yabush69/

#ghaamchhaya

В© 2026 ClassX Presentation

snippet.title: JAMESY - NACHANA ft VZN & Hennie Baker (Prod @YogeshBeats)
snippet.description:
вҖңNachanaвҖқ is a high-energy Nepali track inspired by the infectious grooves of Brazilian funk, blended with our own desi flavor. рҹ’ғрҹҸҪрҹ•әрҹҸҪ
This song is all about movement, confidence, and letting the rhythm take overвҖ”when the beat drops, timi NACHANA.

From heavy bass to catchy hooks, вҖңNachanaвҖқ brings global sounds together with a Nepali soul. Turn up the volume, feel the groove, and dance like nobodyвҖҷs watching.

рҹҺ§ Listen. Feel. Nacha

Written and Performed by 

JAMESY

рҹҺӨ Lyrics: Rema - Calm Down 

[Intro]
(Vibez)
Another banger

[Chorus]
Baby, calm down, calm down
Girl, this your body e put my heart for lockdown, for lockdown, oh, lockdown
Girl, you sweet like Fanta, ooh, Fanta, ooh
If I tell you say, "I love you," no dey form yanga, oh, oh, yanga, oh
No tell me no, no, no, no, whoa, whoa, whoa, whoa
Oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh
Baby, come gimme your lo-lo-lo-lo-lo-lo-lo-lo-whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa
You got me like, "Whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa"
Shawty, come gimme your lo-lo-lo-lo-lo-lo-lo-lo-whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa, mm-hm

[Verse 1]
I see this fine girl for my party, she wear yellow
Every other girl, they dey do too much but this girl mellow
Na'im I dey find situation I go use take tell am, "Hello"
Finally, I find way to talk to the girl, but she no wan follow
Who you come dey form for-whoa? (Mm-hm)
Why you no wan conform-whoa? (Mm-hm)
Then I start to feel her bum-bum, warm (Mm-hm)
But she dey gimme small, small-whoa
I know say she sabi pass that one-one (Mm-hm)
But she feeling insecure-whoa
'Cause her friends go dey gum her like chewing gum-whoa (Mm-hm)
Go dey gum her like chewing gum-whoa, whoa-whoa, oh

[Chorus]
Baby, calm down, calm down
Girl, this your body e put my heart for lockdown, for lockdown, oh, lockdown
Girl, you sweet like Fanta, ooh, Fanta, ooh
If I tell you say, "I love you," no dey form yanga, oh, oh, yanga, oh
No tell me no, no, no, no, whoa, whoa, whoa, whoa
Oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh
Baby, come gimme your lo-lo-lo-lo-lo-lo-lo-lo-whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa
You got me like, "Whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa"
Shawty, come gimme your lo-lo-lo-lo-lo-lo-lo-lo-whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa, mm-hm

[Verse 2]
As I reach my house, I say make I rest small-whoa (Make a rest small-whoa)
As me I wake up, na she dey my mind, oh-whoa (Na she dey my mind, oh-whoa)
Day one, day two-wo, I no fit focus (I no fit focus)
Na so me I call am, say, "Make we link up" (I say make we link up)
As I start to dey tell her how I feel, now my heart dey race
Baby girl, if you leave me, I no go love again
Because e get many girls wey put my heart for pain
Shebi, you feel my pain? Yeah, yeah

[Chorus]
Baby, calm down, calm down
Girl, this your body e put my heart for lockdown, for lockdown, oh, lockdown
Girl, you sweet like Fanta, ooh, Fanta, ooh
If I tell you say, "I love you," no dey form yanga, oh, oh, yanga, oh
No tell me no, no, no, no, whoa, whoa, whoa, whoa
Oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh

You got me like, "Whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa"
Shawty, come gimme your lo-lo-lo-lo-lo-lo-lo-lo-whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa, mm-hm

id.title: Saya berhenti...
id.description:
Aku Menyerah...

Akhirnya Blox Fruits..!?

Oke, jadi dengarkan, jangan klik tautan profil Roblox apa pun. Jika kamu mengkliknya, ini akan terjadi padamu juga.
Aku mencoba mengubah kata sandiku, tetapi kodenya tidak pernah datang. 1-5 menit kemudian, 45 menit kemudian datang 1 kode, tetapi aku memasukkan kode tersebut dan muncul pesan kode salah. Mungkin aku mengklik kirim ulang kode 7 kali. + Dalam video, aku tidak sengaja mengatakan 2-3 jam setelah aku mengubah kata sandi. Maksudku, kodenya tidak berfungsi. Kemudian 6-8 jam setelah 6-8 jam, datang 1 kode, kode itu berfungsi. Aku mengubah kata sandi. + Setelah selesai, kodenya tidak pernah datang selama 1 hari, kemudian 2-3 hari, dan kemudian 3 hari di malam hari aku mencoba meminta kode dan kode itu datang dalam 1 menit dan aku mengubahnya. + Agak sulit dijelaskan dalam bahasa Inggris. + Untungnya, semuanya berjalan baik sekarang. + Hari ini aku mengubah keamananku menjadi Author!

+ Gabung Discord Saya di Sini: https://discord.gg/wmqUbMzQRZ

#bloxfruits #roblox

fr-FR.title: J'ai arrГӘtГ©...
fr-FR.description:
J'ai arrГӘtГ©...

La fin de Blox Fruits...!?

Гүcoutez bien : ne cliquez sur aucun lien de profil Roblox. Si vous le faites, Г§a vous arrivera aussi.

J'ai essayГ© de changer mon mot de passe, mais le code n'arrivait jamais. Au bout de 1 Г  5 minutes, j'ai reГ§u un code, mais il Г©tait incorrect. J'ai dГ» cliquer 7 fois sur В«В Renvoyer le codeВ В». Dans la vidГ©o, je dis par erreur que j'ai changГ© de mot de passe 2 Г  3 heures plus tard, mais le code ne fonctionnait pas. AprГЁs 6 Г  8 heures d'attente, j'ai reГ§u un code valide, j'ai changГ© mon mot de passe, puis je n'ai plus reГ§u de code pendant 1 jour, puis 2 ou 3 jours, et enfin 3 jours plus tard, la nuit, j'ai essayГ© de le redemander et il est arrivГ© en 1 minute. Je l'ai changГ©. C'est un peu difficile Г  expliquer en anglais. Heureusement, tout est rentrГ© dans l'ordre maintenant. Aujourd'hui, j'ai changГ© mon deuxiГЁme mot de passe de sГ©curitГ© en В«В AuteurВ В»В !

Rejoignez mon serveur Discord iciВ : https://discord.gg/wmqUbMzQRZ

#bloxfruits #roblox

hi.title: аӨ®аҘҲаӨӮ аӨӣаҘӢаӨЎаӨјаӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘӮаӨӮ...
hi.description:
аӨ®аҘҲаӨӮаӨЁаҘҮ аӨӣаҘӢаӨЎаӨј аӨҰаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ...

it.title: Ho smesso...
it.description:
Ho smesso...

I frutti di fine Blox...!?

Okey, quindi ascolta, non cliccare su nessun link del profilo Roblox, se lo clicchi, succederГ  anche a te.
Ho provato a cambiare la mia password ma il codice non ГЁ mai arrivato. Dopo 1-5 minuti ГЁ arrivato 1 codice, ma quando l'ho inserito mi ha detto "codice sbagliato", forse ho cliccato 7 volte e ho reinviato il codice + nel video ho detto per sbaglio che dopo 2-3 ore ho cambiato password, cioГЁ il codice non funzionava. Dopo 6-8 ore ГЁ arrivato 1 codice, funzionava, ho cambiato password + dopo averlo cambiato il codice non ГЁ mai arrivato, poi dopo 2-3 giorni e dopo 3 giorni di notte ho provato a chiedere il codice ed ГЁ arrivato in 1 minuto e l'ho cambiato + un po' difficile da spiegare in inglese + per fortuna ora ГЁ andato tutto bene + oggi ho cambiato il mio 2security in auther!

+ Unisciti al mio Discord qui: https://discord.gg/wmqUbMzQRZ

#bloxfruits #roblox

es-US.title: Lo dejo...
es-US.description:
Renuncio...

ВЎFin de las frutas Blox!?

Bueno, escucha, no hagas clic en ningГәn enlace de perfil de Roblox. Si lo haces, esto tambiГ©n te pasarГЎ.
IntentГ© cambiar mi contraseГұa, pero el cГіdigo nunca llegГі. Entre 1 y 5 minutos despuГ©s, 45 minutos despuГ©s, apareciГі un cГіdigo, pero lo introduje y decГӯa que era incorrecto. QuizГЎs hice clic 7 veces para reenviar el cГіdigo. En el video, accidentalmente, a las 2 o 3 horas, cambiГ© la contraseГұa. O sea, el cГіdigo no funcionaba. Entre 6 y 8 horas despuГ©s, apareciГі un cГіdigo que funcionaba. CambiГ© la contraseГұa. DespuГ©s de cambiarlo, el cГіdigo nunca llegГі. Un dГӯa, dos o tres dГӯas despuГ©s y tres dГӯas despuГ©s, por la noche, intentГ© pedir el cГіdigo y llegГі en un minuto. Lo cambiГ©. Fue difГӯcil explicarlo en inglГ©s. Por suerte, todo saliГі bien. ВЎHoy cambiГ© mi contraseГұa de seguridad a la de autor!

pt-BR.title: Eu desisto...
pt-BR.description:
Desisto...

O fim do Blox Fruits...!?

Ok, entГЈo escutem, nГЈo cliquem em nenhum link de perfil do Roblox. Se clicarem, isso vai acontecer com vocГӘs tambГ©m.
Eu tentei mudar minha senha, mas o cГіdigo nunca chegou. Depois de 1 a 5 minutos, chegou um cГіdigo, mas quando o inseri, apareceu como cГіdigo incorreto. Talvez eu tenha clicado em "reenviar cГіdigo" umas 7 vezes. AlГ©m disso, no vГӯdeo, eu disse sem querer que levei de 2 a 3 horas para mudar a senha, mas na verdade o cГіdigo nГЈo funcionou. Depois de 6 a 8 horas, chegou um cГіdigo que funcionou e eu mudei a senha. Depois de mudar a senha, o cГіdigo nГЈo chegou por um dia, depois de 2 a 3 dias e, finalmente, depois de 3 dias Г  noite, tentei pedir o cГіdigo e ele chegou em 1 minuto e eu o mudei. (Гү um pouco difГӯcil explicar em inglГӘs.) Felizmente, tudo deu certo agora. Hoje, mudei meu 2Security para Auther!

+ Entre no meu Discord aqui: https://discord.gg/wmqUbMzQRZ

de-DE.title: Ich gebe auf...
de-DE.description:
Ich hГ¶re auf...

Das Ende von Roblox Fruits...!?

Okay, also hГ¶rt zu: Klickt bloГҹ nicht auf Roblox-Profillinks! Wenn ihr das tut, passiert euch das auch. Ich habe versucht, mein Passwort zu ГӨndern, aber der Code kam erst nach 1-5 Minuten. Nach 45 Minuten kam dann ein Code, aber als ich ihn eingegeben habe, hieГҹ es, er sei falsch. Ich habe dann bestimmt sieben Mal auf вҖһCode erneut sendenвҖң geklickt. Im Video habe ich versehentlich gesagt, dass ich das Passwort vor 2-3 Stunden geГӨndert habe. Ich meine, der Code hat nicht funktioniert. Nach 6-8 Stunden kam dann endlich ein Code, der funktioniert hat. Ich habe mein Passwort geГӨndert. Nachdem ich das getan hatte, kam der Code einen Tag lang nicht, dann wieder 2-3 Tage und schlieГҹlich, drei Tage spГӨter, nachts habe ich versucht, einen Code anzufordern. Er kam innerhalb einer Minute und ich habe ihn geГӨndert. Schwer zu erklГӨren auf Englisch. Zum GlГјck ist jetzt alles gut gegangen. Heute habe ich meine Zwei-Faktor-Authentifizierung auf Autorisierung umgestellt!

Tritt meinem Discord-Server hier bei: https://discord.gg/wmqUbMzQRZ

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. ItвҖҷs unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX вҖ” interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything вҖ” be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer вҖңCapture the FlagвҖқ game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (вҖңRobuxвҖқ). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

#Roblox #foltyn

snippet.title: ROBLOX RUN FOR BRAINROTS!
snippet.description:
Today I ran for brainrots in Roblox! Make sure you watch the whole video to find out what happens. 

FOLTYN MERCH: https://foltyn.shop/

--Socials--

Discord: https://discord.gg/hqwZhrkqRr

Roblox Group: https://www.roblox.com/groups/1177555...

Roblox Name: TheRealFoltyn

Insta: https://www.instagram.com/foltynn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. ItвҖҷs unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX вҖ” interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything вҖ” be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer вҖңCapture the FlagвҖқ game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (вҖңRobuxвҖқ). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

ItвҖҷs unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX вҖ” interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything вҖ” be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer вҖңCapture the FlagвҖқ game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (вҖңRobuxвҖқ). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

snippet.description:
рҹӨ”aaj kunali or piyush Milne aaye рҹҳұ Indian theft aura simulator ||Indian bike 3d


What happens when the worlds of gaming, vlogging, and cartoons collide? In todayвҖҷs action-packed episode of Indian Bikes Driving 3D, we are heading on a massive mission!
The Storyline:
We are traveling deep into the village to meet the legends themselvesвҖ”Sourav Joshi, Piyush Joshi, and Kunal! But we aren't going empty-handed. To make this meeting unforgettable, weвҖҷve secured a luxury Ferrari as a special gift!
The Squad:
ItвҖҷs not just a solo trip! WeвҖҷve got the ultimate gang traveling together by train:
Chacha (The muscle)
Doraemon (With his gadgets ready)
Shinchan (Bringing the mischief)
Watch us navigate the tracks, manage the heavy cargo on the train, and drive through the village roads to deliver this supercar to the Joshi family. Will we reach safely, or will there be chaos on the way?
Buckle up for the most legendary delivery in simulator history!

The Mission: Delivering a Ferrari via train.
The Guests: Sourav Joshi, Piyush, and Kunal.

The Game: Indian Bikes Driving 3D (Indian Simulator).

аӨҮаӨё аӨёаӨ¬аҘҚаӨёаӨ•аҘҚаӨ°аӨҫаӨҮаӨ¬аӨ° аӨ•аӨҫ 121 OVR аӨөаӨҫаӨІаӨҫ аӨ«аҘҚаӨ°аҘҖ-аӨҹаҘӮ-аӨӘаҘҚаӨІаҘҮ аӨ…аӨ•аӨҫаӨүаӨӮаӨҹ аӨүаӨёаӨ•аҘҮ аӨҸаӨ• аӨҰаҘӢаӨёаҘҚаӨӨ аӨЁаҘҮ аӨ№аҘҲаӨ• аӨ•аӨ°аӨ•аҘҮ аӨЎаӨҝаӨІаҘҖаӨҹ аӨ•аӨ° аӨҰаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ аӨҘаӨҫаҘӨ аӨҮаӨёаӨІаӨҝаӨҸ аӨ®аҘҲаӨӮаӨЁаҘҮ аӨ…аӨӘаӨЁаҘҮ аӨӘаҘҲаӨёаҘӢаӨӮ аӨёаҘҮ аӨүаӨёаӨ•аӨҫ аӨҰаҘӮаӨёаӨ°аӨҫ аӨ…аӨ•аӨҫаӨүаӨӮаӨҹ аӨ«аӨҝаӨ° аӨёаҘҮ аӨ¬аӨЁаӨҫаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ”аӨ° аӨүаӨёаҘҮ аӨӘаӨ№аӨІаҘҮ аӨёаҘҮ аӨӯаҘҖ аӨ¬аҘҮаӨ№аӨӨаӨ° аӨ¬аӨЁаӨҫ аӨҰаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ! рҹҳӨрҹ”Ҙ

аӨ¬аӨҝаӨІаҘҚаӨ•аҘҒаӨІ аӨ¶аҘӮаӨЁаҘҚаӨҜ аӨёаҘҮ аӨ¶аҘҒаӨ°аҘҒаӨҶаӨӨ аӨ•аӨ°аӨӨаҘҮ аӨ№аҘҒаӨҸ вҖ” аӨЁ аӨ•аҘүаӨҮаӨЁ, аӨЁ аӨҹаҘҚаӨ°аҘҮаӨЎ аӨ•аӨ°аӨЁаҘҮ аӨІаӨҫаӨҜаӨ• аӨҶаӨҮаӨҹаӨ®, аӨЁ аӨ°аҘҲаӨӮаӨ•аӨ…аӨӘ аӨӘаҘүаӨҮаӨӮаӨҹ вҖ” аӨ•аҘҚаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ№аӨ® 122 OVR аӨӨаӨ• аӨӘаӨ№аҘҒаӨҒаӨҡ аӨёаӨ•аӨӨаҘҮ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮ? аӨңаӨҫаӨЁаӨЁаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨІаӨҝаӨҸ аӨөаҘҖаӨЎаӨҝаӨҜаҘӢ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨ…аӨӮаӨӨ аӨӨаӨ• аӨҰаҘҮаӨ–аҘҮаӨӮ!

рҹҺҒ аӨ•аҘҚаӨҜаӨҫ аӨҶаӨӘ аӨ…аӨӘаӨЁаӨҫ аӨ…аӨ•аӨҫаӨүаӨӮаӨҹ аӨ…аӨӘаӨ—аҘҚаӨ°аҘҮаӨЎ аӨ•аӨ°аӨөаӨҫаӨЁаӨҫ аӨҡаӨҫаӨ№аӨӨаҘҮ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮ? вҖ” аӨҜаӨ№аӨҫаӨҒ аӨ¬аӨӨаӨҫаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ—аӨҜаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ аӨ•аӨҝ аӨ•аҘҲаӨёаҘҮ аӨӯаӨҫаӨ— аӨІаҘҮаӨӮ:
- аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аҘҮ аӨҡаҘҲаӨЁаӨІ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨёаӨ¬аҘҚаӨёаӨ•аҘҚаӨ°аӨҫаӨҮаӨ¬ аӨ•аӨ°аҘҮаӨӮ
- аӨҮаӨё аӨөаҘҖаӨЎаӨҝаӨҜаҘӢ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨІаӨҫаӨҮаӨ• аӨ•аӨ°аҘҮаӨӮ
- аӨЁаҘҖаӨҡаҘҮ аӨ…аӨӘаӨЁаӨҫ аӨөаӨ°аҘҚаӨӨаӨ®аӨҫаӨЁ OVR аӨ•аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮаӨҹ аӨ•аӨ°аҘҮаӨӮ!

аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аҘҮ аӨёаӨ¬аҘҚаӨёаӨ•аҘҚаӨ°аӨҫаӨҮаӨ¬аӨ° аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ…аӨ•аӨҫаӨүаӨӮаӨҹ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨ…аӨӘаӨ—аҘҚаӨ°аҘҮаӨЎ аӨ•аӨ°аӨЁаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ…аӨ—аӨІаҘҮ аӨҸаӨӘаӨҝаӨёаҘӢаӨЎ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨІаӨҝаӨҸ аӨөаӨҝаӨңаҘҮаӨӨаӨҫаӨ“аӨӮ аӨ•аӨҫ аӨҡаӨҜаӨЁ аӨ•аӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ аӨңаӨҫаӨҸаӨ—аӨҫ!

вҡ пёҸ аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аӨҫ аӨҶаӨ§аӨҝаӨ•аӨҫаӨ°аӨҝаӨ• аӨҮаӨӮаӨёаҘҚаӨҹаӨҫаӨ—аҘҚаӨ°аӨҫаӨ®, аӨҹаҘҚаӨөаӨҝаӨҹаӨ° аӨ”аӨ° аӨҲаӨ®аҘҮаӨІ аӨӘаӨҝаӨЁ аӨ•аӨҝаӨҸ аӨ—аӨҸ аӨ•аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮаӨҹ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ
аӨ…аӨ—аӨ° аӨ•аҘӢаӨҲ аӨ”аӨ° аӨҶаӨӘаӨ•аҘӢ аӨ®аҘҲаӨёаҘҮаӨң аӨ•аӨ°аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ®аҘҒаӨқаӨёаҘҮ аӨ№аҘӢаӨЁаҘҮ аӨ•аӨҫ аӨҰаӨҫаӨөаӨҫ аӨ•аӨ°аӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ, аӨӨаҘӢ аӨөаӨ№ аӨёаҘҚаӨ•аҘҲаӨ®аӨ° аӨ№аҘҲ!

рҹ”” аӨёаӨ¬аҘҚаӨёаӨ•аҘҚаӨ°аӨҫаӨҮаӨ¬ аӨ•аӨ°аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ”аӨ° аӨ®аҘҒаӨқаҘҮ 3 аӨ®аӨҝаӨІаӨҝаӨҜаӨЁ аӨёаӨ¬аҘҚаӨёаӨ•аҘҚаӨ°аӨҫаӨҮаӨ¬аӨ° аӨӨаӨ• аӨӘаӨ№аҘҒаӨҒаӨҡаӨЁаҘҮ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ®аӨҰаӨҰ аӨ•аӨ°аҘҮаӨӮ!
